ze.quest.0.title: crash
ze.quest.0.subtitle: Supply selection
ze.quest.0.des:
While exploring space, you crashed into this world, the ‘Overworld’, for some reason. Fortunately, the body was fine, but the spacecraft was so badly damaged that it could not be found.

Luckily, you grabbed a supply crate when you went down. The problem is that you don't have time to check the contents of the box, so you don't know what's inside, and it may even be damaged from the impact of a fall, making it impossible to save anything.
ze.quest.0.reward: How about the supply box you packed?
ze.quest.1.title: Jup Jup
ze.quest.1.subtitle: flint and stick
ze.quest.1.des:
First, let's make tools for survival. Let's get the most useful wood to process.

It will take a long time to cut down the tree by hand. So we need to create some basic tools.

The stick can be obtained by breaking a thicker branch rather than the main pillar of the tree.
You can get flint randomly by scooping up gravel, or you can definitely get flint by combining three. Alternatively, you can dig up dirt (without grass) and have a chance to get flint.
ze.quest.2.title: RPG
ze.quest.2.subtitle: Empowerment
ze.quest.2.des:
You can open the stats screen for Better Leveling mode by pressing Alt+`(~). You can start with one of three specializations: Combat, Mining, and Crafting, and each specialization has different stats that can be raised. These can be raised through experience points.

It costs level 30 to unlock other specializations.
ze.quest.3_1.title: Shoo shoo shoo shoo shoo
ze.quest.3_1.subtitle: flint cleaver
ze.quest.3_1.des:
You can create a flint knife by combining flint and a stick.

The kitchen knife is used for cooking, but it also has the function of cutting grass to obtain straw. It can also be used as a weapon when in a hurry.
zs.quest.4.title: Weave nature together
ze.quest.4.subtitle: straw
ze.quest.4.des: If you cut grass, etc. with a kitchen knife, you can obtain straw with a certain probability. Through this, you can craft string or a flint ax that can be used in the early game.
ze.quest.5.title: Earth Breaker
ze.quest.5.subtitle: flint ax
ze.quest.5.des:
You can now craft an ax that can chop down trees.

Craft a flint ax by weaving flint, a stick, and straw obtained from a kitchen knife.
ze.quest.6.title: A tree to give generously
ze.quest.6.subtitle: solid wood
ze.quest.6.des:
Finally, you can cut down trees. If you cut down the base of a tree, the tree will fall down and you can obtain wood and other things.

Be careful not to get crushed by falling trees.

In fact, you can just cut it down without an axe. But it takes a long time, right?
ze.quest.8.title: I am! You can dominate the trees!
ze.quest.8.subtitle: wooden planks
ze.quest.8.des: You can obtain 4 planks by processing logs. In the future, machines will allow you to obtain more boards from a single log.
ze.quest.9.title: artificial sun sailing through space
ze.quest.9.subtitle: Spacecraft power generation facility [nuclear fusion]
ze.quest.9.des:
(Translated by PDA) There is nothing better than a nuclear fusion reactor for power generation within a spacecraft. Since you probably already have experience making it, I won't give you a long explanation.

Don't worry. The fusion reactor will also be built by the construction system. As long as you have the ingredients.
ze.quest.10.title: It doesn't matter whether it's a workbench or a combination table.
ze.quest.10.subtitle: crafting table
ze.quest.10.des: Craft a crafting table by combining 4 wooden planks. If you install a crafting table and right-click, you can create a 3*3 combination that is larger than the existing 2*2 space, allowing you to create more diverse things.
ze.quest.11.title: A game finally worthy of its name
ze.quest.11.subtitle: Wooden pickaxe, stone pickaxe, and furnace
ze.quest.11.des:
Craft a wooden pickaxe using wooden planks and sticks at a crafting table. You can now mine stone or metal with a pickaxe.

You can mine stones to obtain cobblestones, and use those cobblestones to create a furnace to heat various things.

In order to mine harder items, you must craft a new pickaxe using stone and iron as the main materials.
ze.quest.12.title: origin of water
ze.quest.12.subtitle: Spacecraft fuel [liquefied D-T fuel]
ze.quest.12.des: (Translated by PDA) The fuel for the fusion reactor is equally D-T fuel. However, it needs to be liquefied to facilitate storage within the spacecraft.
ze.quest.13.title: smoke generator
ze.quest.13.subtitle: Spacecraft spare power generation facility [diesel generator]
ze.quest.13.des:
(Translated as PDA) Electric power to operate the fusion reactor and a backup generator must be provided in case the fusion reactor operation is stopped in unavoidable circumstances.

A diesel generator that boasts sufficient power generation, although not as powerful as a fusion reactor, is ideal.
ze.quest.14.title: oil rich
ze.quest.14.subtitle: Spacecraft spare fuel [diesel]
ze.quest.14.des: (Translated by PDA) It is the fuel for the spacecraft's diesel generator and is also used to light a fire.
ze.quest.15.title: The best defense is offense.
ze.quest.15.subtitle: Spaceship defense weapon [laser]
ze.quest.15.des:
(Translated by PDA) It is also used to operate the spacecraft fusion reactor, but there are many hazards in space. Usually, meteorites hit the ship's hull or space pirates attack.

I hope your ship's lasers only cut down meteorites.
ze.quest.16.title: metal combination
ze.quest.16.subtitle: spaceship-based materials
ze.quest.16.des: (Translated by PDA) The spacecraft's base materials are aluminum, nickel, steel and HOP graphite.
ze.quest.17.title: valuable partner
ze.quest.17.subtitle: traveler's backpack
ze.quest.17.des:
You will soon run out of inventory. .. You already had enough a long time ago. Anyway, once you can process wood, you can make a backpack.

In the beginning, you are given two options. Version with and without liquid tank. The version with a tank requires additional materials, including iron, so we recommend the version without one.

If you wear it on the back of the Curios inventory (top left of the inventory character), you can then open the backpack with Alt+E.

The main function is to place tools in the tool slot on the left of the top buttons and replace them by pressing and holding X. You can also use the sleeping bag by pressing the button between the backpack and inventory.

If you can afford it, you can upgrade at the blacksmith workbench later.
ze.quest.18.title: Jannabi
ze.quest.18.subtitle: grappling hook
ze.quest.18.des:
We have the tools you need to explore this wide and rugged world. It's a grappling hook.

All you need is some string and an iron pickaxe.

Hold it in your hand and left-click to use the grapple hook to lock it in place, and while crouching, you can use W and S to climb up and down. And when the line is as short as possible, you can jump to break the grapple. Detailed operation instructions are written in the item description.
ze.quest.19.title: reinforced coal
ze.quest.19.subtitle: coke oven
ze.quest.19.des:
A coke oven is needed to process coal or charcoal more efficiently.

This machine requires 3*3*3 space. After installing the coke bricks in 3*3*3, right-click on the center with the 'Engineer's Hammer' that you will receive as a reward to complete the process.

When processing with coke, a by-product, creosote oil, is produced, and if it becomes full, the oven will stop working. This creosote oil is needed to make preservative wood, so it is recommended to save it.
ze.quest.20.title: Immersive Engineering
ze.quest.20.subtitle: blast furnace
ze.quest.20.des:
At this point, you'll need a furnace to smelt your own steel. You can make it in the same way as a coke oven.

Smelting begins when coke is added as fuel and iron is added.

The slag produced as a by-product is used as a building material or as a fertilizer for gardening.

Are you in trouble because the materials require Nether materials? You can create obsidian directly in a bucket to open nether doors and obtain resources. It's definitely not impossible.

There is also a simpler way. Go down as far as you can. -Up to a depth of about 60 degrees. If you stay too long, the dimensional power will swallow you up. When you come back, you can do the opposite.
ze.quest.21.title: engineer of steel
ze.quest.21.subtitle: steel ingot
ze.quest.21.des:
Steel, which performs better than iron, is widely needed as a material for equipment and machinery. Currently, it can be obtained through Immersive Engineering.

A pickaxe made of this material is capable of breaking obsidian. If diamonds are a waste, this is the perfect material.

If you have reached a level where you can smelt this metal, you have now reached a level where you no longer have to worry about making a living.


After adjusting to the overworld to some extent, you explore the crash site and, with luck, discover some usable communication devices among the spaceship's parts. Install a beacon to alert other alien forces of your location, and establish communication using a radio kit.
ze.quest.22.title: Create
ze.quest.22.subtitle: Andesite alloy and case
ze.quest.22.des:
You are ready to handle Create machines. Some structures in this world already have these technologies, so you can take them off and use them, but you also need to know how to craft them in order to use them properly.

The most characteristic feature of Create machines is that they use rotational force to create an intuitive shape (and therefore a rack). Also, if you place the cursor on most items (machines) and hold down W, a dedicated guide window will appear.

First, make andesite alloy, which is the core material of Create machines, and a case. You can create an alloy by combining steel pieces and andesite. Don't make a lot. It can be produced in a more efficient way in the future.

Andesite Cases can be crafted by right-clicking Andesite Alloy on an installed peeled tree. Alternatively, you can save Andesite Alloy by crafting 4 Andesite Cases with 4 Preservative Wood and 1 Andesite Alloy.
ze.quest.23_1.title: manpower
ze.quest.23_1.subtitle: hand crank
ze.quest.23_1.des:
The simplest way to create rotational force is to turn it yourself. Install it on an axle or axis of a machine and keep right-clicking to provide rotational force.

However, the speed and rotational force are weak, so other methods must be used in the future. And it's also annoying.
ze.quest.23.2.title: power transmission
ze.quest.23.2.subtitle: axles and gears
ze.quest.23.2.des:
These are the basic elements used to transmit rotational force. More precisely, it transmits rotational force (force) and speed.

If the speed is slow and frustrating, use this method in the beginning.
A small cogwheel is engaged with a large cogwheel, and the small cogwheel shaft is connected to another large cogwheel shaft. And when you engage the small gears, you can see that the last small gear turns faster than the first large gear.

The problem is that rotational force and speed are usually inversely proportional. For example, even if the same power is received from the same place, if the speed is high, the rotational force decreases, and conversely, if the rotational force is strong, the speed decreases.
ze.quest.23.3.title: Water Breathing Type 2
ze.quest.23.3.subtitle: water wheel
ze.quest.23.3.des:
A water wheel, one of the basic power generators, literally uses flowing water to produce power.

Just touching flowing water (any liquid, to be exact) provides constant speed and rotational force.

By combining it with 8 additional planks, you can create a large water wheel that is slower but provides more rotational power.
ze.quest.24.title: To operate by ‘pressing’ ~
ze.quest.24.subtitle: press
ze.quest.24.des:
When subjected to rotational force, it compresses the items placed below.

You can simply place the item on the floor, but to use it more neatly, it is recommended to place the item on the item stand and install a press on it to operate it.

If you use a basin instead of an item stand, you can compress multiple items into one. For example, compressing 9 iron ingots can be processed into an iron block.
ze.quest.25.title: modular workbench
ze.quest.25.subtitle: Combinator
ze.quest.25.des:
Basically, you can make combinations that can be made at a regular workbench, and by increasing the size, you can make things that can only be made at a combination machine.

To obtain brass, you need to mix copper and zinc in a 1:1 ratio, and there are several ways to do this. You can also combine two molten metals at places like the Tinker's Forge, craft them through Create's Mixer and Blaze Burner, or obtain them through Immersive Engineering's Alloy Kiln.
ze.quest.26.title: Entrapment accident generator
ze.quest.26.subtitle: grinding wheel
ze.quest.26.des:
You can grind multiple items depending on their size. For it to work, both wheels must rotate in opposite directions and items must be inserted in the correct direction.

It can be installed and operated even when lying down. Of course, other devices such as belts are also needed.

For reference, you can obtain crushed mineral ores and by-products by adding ore. And if you use the fan to crush the crushed mineral ore, you can get a by-product that is different from the by-product you get from the Tinker's Melting Station.
ze.quest.27.title: summer essentials
ze.quest.27.subtitle: electric fan
ze.quest.27.des:
Just install it and apply rotational force to push or pull the entity. However, what you can do depends on what is in front of the fan.

If there is water, it cleans the item, and if there is lava, it reforges the item. Additionally, fire smokes (cooks) items and soul fire transforms items.
ze.quest.28.title: The magic wand of the cogwheel world
ze.quest.28.subtitle: wrench
ze.quest.28.des:
This simple yet important tool is needed when working with most Create machines.

This is a very inconvenient tool without it, as you can not only change the direction of the machine, but also instantly retrieve the machine by crouching and right-clicking.
ze.quest.29.title: auto mouse
ze.quest.29.subtitle: machine hand
ze.quest.29.des: You can left-click or right-click, and it will give you an item so you can play the role you want.
ze.quest.30.title: fluid dynamics
ze.quest.30.subtitle: fluid tank and fluid pipe etc.
ze.quest.30.des:
A means of storing or transporting liquids. It powers a pump to transport liquid through pipes.

Please note that a pump only transports liquid a certain distance, so if you need to transport a longer distance, you must install an additional pump in the middle.
ze.quest.31.title: industrial revolution
ze.quest.31.subtitle: belt
ze.quest.31.des:
If you put it on the shaft and apply rotational force to the shaft, the belt will turn in that direction and transport entities such as items on top.

They cannot be connected at angles other than right angles and 45 degrees.
ze.quest.32.title: stone breaker
ze.quest.32.subtitle: drill
ze.quest.32.des: If you apply rotational force, it will break stones in front.
ze.quest.33.title: Interacting with moving structures
ze.quest.33.subtitle: Item interface and isomorphism detector
ze.quest.33.des:
The item interface is mainly used to insert or remove items from moving structures. If you are sending or receiving an item, the structure will stop until the item transfer is complete.

Homomorphic detectors emit a redstone signal whenever they encounter one another.
ze.quest.34.title: Elements for automated farming
ze.quest.34.subtitle: saw and harvester
ze.quest.34.des:
The saw not only cuts down trees in front of it, but also processes wooden items when thrown. Additionally, processing raw wood can yield more than combined wood. However, because it can produce different results, it is recommended to set filters.

The harvester grows plants that have completed growth in the front and replants them if there are seeds in the connected inventory.

To use them in automated farming, they must be connected to a moving structure
ze.quest.35.title: Elements for moving structures
ze.quest.35.subtitle: Strong Adhesives and Bearings
ze.quest.35.des: To create a moving structure, which is one of Create's features, simply connect the desired blocks with strong adhesive and apply rotational force to bearings or other things that can move the structure.
ze.quest.36.title: Steve the Dive
ze.quest.36.subtitle: diving set
ze.quest.36.des:
If you want to explore underwater, you might want to wear this gear.

When worn with a copper oxygen tank, the copper diving helmet consumes oxygen underwater and grants underwater breathing.

If you install a copper oxygen tank and apply power to the shaft, oxygen will slowly be charged.

These two pieces of equipment are sufficient, but if you want to move underwater as if you were on land, you'll need copper diving boots. Copper diving boots allow you to float underwater, quickly sink to the bottom, and jump underwater.
ze.quest.37.title: Fluid Mechanics (Extra)
ze.quest.37.subtitle: Hose pulley and fluid interface
ze.quest.37.des:
Hose pulleys are useful for efficiently transporting liquids in deep locations. Basic pipes can also be transported using a pump, but if you need to scoop up lava from a deep place, you can use this hose pulley rather than connecting pipes all the way down.

Fluid interfaces are used to add and remove liquids from moving structures. If liquid is being transferred, the structure will stop until the liquid transfer is complete.
ze.quest.38.title: steampunk 2025
ze.quest.38.subtitle: steam engine
ze.quest.38.des: It is a device that outputs strong rotational force (force). It can be installed on four or more connected liquid tanks and is powered by a continuous supply of water to the liquid tanks and a heat source such as a bonfire or blaze burner below the tanks.
ze.quest.39.title: Mix it up
ze.quest.39.subtitle: mixer
ze.quest.39.des:
It can be installed on a basin and operated by applying rotational force at a certain speed or higher.

In normal state, you can simply mix items, but by using the Blaze Burner that will be crafted later, you will be able to craft more diverse things.
ze.quest.40.title: Calcifer
ze.quest.40.subtitle: blaze burner
ze.quest.40.des:
You can complete a blaze burner by holding an empty blaze burner and right-clicking on the blaze or blaze spawner.

In its basic state, it performs at or below the level of a bonfire, but when fuel in the form of an item is injected, it generates high heat. Additionally, when special fuel is injected, it enters an ultra-high temperature heating state.
ze.quest.41.title: pseudo semiconductor
ze.quest.41.subtitle: precision machinery
ze.quest.41.des: Precision mechanical devices manufactured using mechanical hands are used as key components in Create's advanced machines and Immersive Engineering's machines, which we will discuss later.
ze.quest.42.title: plastic surgery
ze.quest.42.subtitle: rolling mill
ze.quest.42.des: It is used to make metal, etc. into bars or wires.
ze.quest.43.title: Zodiac sign
ze.quest.43.subtitle: external extension arm
ze.quest.43.des:
When held, the interaction distance increases. This also applies if you hold it in your other hand and pick up the desired item with your main hand.

However, durability wears out with use. Instead, if you use the oxygen tank with the oxygen tank empty, the oxygen in the tank will be consumed first instead of durability.
ze.quest.44.title: Pouring lava on obsidian
ze.quest.44.subtitle: steel plate
ze.quest.44.des:
Pour lava into obsidian powder and press it twice with a press to complete the steel plate.

This steel plate is a key material needed to manufacture trains and is also a component material for Immersive Engineering machines.
ze.quest.45.title: Chick-chug-pok-pok
ze.quest.45.subtitle: train building set
ze.quest.45.des:
Train track work is completed once the track is laid and the train stop is connected to the track.

Afterwards, if you activate the train assembly mode at the station, the tracks will be painted blue. When the train case is installed on top of it, a small bogie is installed. Now decorate the train with the desired blocks, including the train controller, attach them with glue, and then press the train assembly button at the train stop to make the train operational.

If you are just going to temporarily travel on the track, you can place the handcar directly on the track and use it.
ze.quest.46.title: hire a train driver
ze.quest.46.subtitle: train schedule
ze.quest.46.des:
If you create a train operation plan using a train plan and give the plan to a blaze burner placed on the train or an animal sitting on a train seat, that entity will be appointed as an engineer.

The appointed engineer operates the train according to the train schedule.
ze.quest.47.title: movement conversion
ze.quest.47.subtitle: alternator
ze.quest.47.des:
Converts rotational force into electric power.

The power generation is determined by the speed (of course, it is proportional).

Power is required to run other modes of machinery, including Immersive Engineering, which will be discussed later.
ze.quest.48.title: Lorentz force
ze.quest.48.subtitle: electric motor
ze.quest.48.des: Power can also be transmitted conversely as rotational force.
ze.quest.49.title: electrical engineering
ze.quest.49.subtitle: Storage battery, terminals and wires
ze.quest.49.des:
Storage batteries can store power and, like liquid tanks, their capacity can be increased in a multi-block form.

Terminals and wires are needed to transport power. Install terminals for each place to send and receive power, and connect the wires through a skein of wire. Then, you can set the input/output settings on the terminal using a wrench.

The amount of power transmitted depends on the wire and also varies depending on the type of terminal.
ze.quest.50.title: redistribution of wealth
ze.quest.50.subtitle: tunnel
ze.quest.50.des:
A tunnel is necessary to sort items being transported on a belt in different directions.

Andesite Tunnels only release items one at a time in different directions.

The Brass Tunnel can export a large amount of items, and you can apply a filter to allow only items set in that direction to enter.
ze.quest.51.title: logistics
ze.quest.51.subtitle: Item safes and funnels, chutes
ze.quest.51.des:
Item safes have more storage capacity than chests for the same amount of space. The size can be increased in multi-block form. However, you cannot insert or remove items from a single item safe. In this case, you can use a funnel.

Andesite funnels allow small quantities of items to be added and removed from connected machines or storage spaces.

Unlike the andesite funnel, the brass funnel allows more items to be inserted and removed at once, and filters can be applied to allow only set items to enter.

The chute generally discharges items from above downwards like a hopper, and can also be connected diagonally or discharge items from the bottom upwards through a fan.

Smart Suit adds filter and quantity functions.
ze.quest.52.title: giant
ze.quest.52.subtitle: Windmill bearings and windmill blades
ze.quest.52.des: You can connect blocks such as windmill blades in front of the windmill bearing. The torque produced increases depending on the number of blocks used as wings.
ze.quest.53.title: not enough ammo
ze.quest.53.subtitle: 45-70 ammo
ze.quest.53.des: You can't have ammunition without a gun, and you can't have a gun without ammunition.
ze.quest.54.title: trapdoor gun
ze.quest.54.subtitle: Springfield 1873 Trapdoor Rifle
ze.quest.54.des:
It's a classic gun that's as simple to make as it is classic.
Although you can only load one shot at a time, it provides quite high firepower in the beginning.

You can reload with R, right-click to aim, and left-click to fire.
You can perform a melee attack with V and crawl with Ctrl.
ze.quest.55.title: sniper born in heaven
ze.quest.55.subtitle: vintage springfield scope
ze.quest.55.des:
This is the only scope that can be mounted on the Springfield 1873 Trapdoor Rifle.

You can attach a gun by holding it and pressing Z to open the gun customization window.

If you crouch while aiming, you can reduce screen shaking by holding your breath, but if you hold your breath for too long, the screen shaking will briefly become worse.
ze.quest.56.title: I will go soon
ze.quest.56.subtitle: alloy kiln
ze.quest.56.des:
After stacking the kiln bricks in a 2*2*2 pattern, right-click with the engineer's hammer to complete the process.

The alloy kiln can smelt basic metals into alloys.
ze.quest.57.title: Burning Golden Blood
ze.quest.57.subtitle: Blaze's Blood
ze.quest.57.des:
It is a high-quality fuel used in fuel tanks used in smelters or melters.

It can produce higher heat than lava, allowing it to smelt high-level metals or alloys.

To make it, put Blaze in a smelter or smelter. If this is difficult, you can melt Ichor Crystal, a crystal that can be obtained from Blaze Head or the Nether.
ze.quest.58.title: doping
ze.quest.58.subtitle: blaze cake
ze.quest.58.des: It is used as blaze burner fuel, and the cake-eating blaze burner radiates much higher heat and is used in crafting recipes that require ultra-high heating conditions.
ze.quest.59.title: Immersive Engineering
ze.quest.59.subtitle: Redstone Engineering Block
ze.quest.59.des:
Ready to handle Immersive Engineering machines. You will have reached the stage where you can not only supply basic resources but also produce high-quality materials through Create machines.

Immersive Engineering machines use power differently than Create. In the beginning, you need to connect the electricity produced by the alternator. The various machines and tools in this mode are explained in the 'Engineer's Manual' that you will receive as a reward.

Immersive Engineering's machines are mainly multi-block machines (examples include coke ovens and blast furnaces). Although the degree of freedom may be lower than that of Create's machines, there are machines that are more efficient. Instead, it consumes a lot of steel, so it is recommended to smelt a lot of steel in advance.

Each machine has a port, and its role is indicated by color. The red color can be turned on and off by receiving a redstone signal, the blue color receives input of item liquid lights, and the orange type outputs item liquid lights. The yellow part is the part that receives power.

Redstone engineering blocks are used as parts for most Immersive Engineering machines. To make it, you need to use Create's machines. Create's retirement will be delayed.
ze.quest.60.title: Fluid Mechanics v2
ze.quest.60.subtitle: Fluid pipes and fluid pumps, fluid routers
ze.quest.60.des:
The unique feature of Immersive Engineering's fluid pipes is that they can contain and transport multiple types of liquids in one pipe. This can be useful in situations where multiple liquids must be extracted from one output area.

A fluid pump can be connected to the middle of a pipe and given power and a redstone signal to transport liquids faster. It can also absorb any liquid it comes into contact with.

The fluid router exports the liquid that enters the fluid router in the direction of the filter color you set. You can set it by dragging the liquid shown on the EMI.

As a side note, Immersive Engineering's liquid-handling machines allow you to add or remove liquid by directly right-clicking the bucket on some input/output ports.
ze.quest.61.title: Entrapment accident generator v2
ze.quest.61.subtitle: grinder
ze.quest.61.des:
When grinding items and minerals, you can obtain additional by-products of the mineral. For example, if you put an iron ore, you can get iron dust and, with a certain probability, one more iron dust.

For production instructions, check the engineer's manual or search for grinder.
ze.quest.62.title: juice
ze.quest.62.subtitle: press
ze.quest.62.des:
It is mainly used to extract juice from plants.

For production instructions, check the engineer's manual or search for a press.
ze.quest.63.title: A noise that shakes the heavens and earth
ze.quest.63.subtitle: arc furnace
ze.quest.63.des:
This large furnace produces high-temperature heat that can smelt various metals. You can obtain additional by-products from alloys as well as ores with a higher probability than smelting them in a grinder.

For construction instructions, check the engineer's manual or search for arc furnace.

It requires three graphite electrodes to be attached as well as power for operation. Graphite electrodes can be crafted by obtaining the 'Arc Furnace Electrode' blueprint from a villager, either as a finished product at the Engineer's Workbench, or in a partially damaged state using a metal compressor. HOP graphite ingots can be made by compressing two HOP graphite powders at extremely high temperatures. Afterwards, it can be processed with a single HOP graphite powder in an arc furnace.

Anyway, when it starts working... it's really noisy. We recommend using an extreme sound muffler. You can mute the desired sound by pressing the speaker icon in your inventory or the shortcut key (Number Pad/).
ze.quest.64.title: Gongdol's desk
ze.quest.64.subtitle: Engineer's Workbench
ze.quest.64.des:
This is a workbench that cannot be combined on a regular crafting table or can be produced more efficiently.

What can be produced is determined by the type of blueprint uploaded. For example, if the 'production parts' blueprint is uploaded, you will be able to produce machine parts that will be made in large quantities in the future by consuming fewer resources.
ze.quest.65.title: industrial revolution v2
ze.quest.65.subtitle: conveyor belt
ze.quest.65.des: It is a belt that can be installed in the form of blocks and can likewise transport items or entities. Extraction conveyor belts can extract items from boxes or machines they are attached to.
ze.quest.66.title: Just before rotting
ze.quest.66.subtitle: fermenter
ze.quest.66.des:
Some plants are fermented to produce ethanol.

For production instructions, check the engineer's manual or search for fermenter.
ze.quest.67.title: tablet
ze.quest.67.subtitle: purifier
ze.quest.67.des:
You can mix one or more liquids or purify them into another liquid through an item.

For production instructions, check the engineer's manual or search for a refiner.
ze.quest.68.title: It's full
ze.quest.68.subtitle: bottling machine
ze.quest.68.des:
Pour the liquid into a bucket or other container that can hold the liquid.

For production instructions, check the engineer's manual or search for a bottling machine.
ze.quest.69.title: Composite thermoset plastic
ze.quest.69.subtitle: duroplast
ze.quest.69.des:
Acetaldehyde is processed by adding ethanol and a silver plate in a purifier, and then refined with creosote oil to make phenol resin. You can then make it by placing it in a metal compression mold: plate in a bottling machine.

Duroplast is later used to fabricate complex circuits.
ze.quest.70.title: circuit
ze.quest.70.subtitle: complex circuit
ze.quest.70.des:
You can build from blueprints of fabricated parts in the Engineer's Workbench.

This is a necessary material to make Mekanism machines.
ze.quest.71.title: Highly oriented pyrolytic graphite
ze.quest.71.subtitle: HOP graphite ingot
ze.quest.71.des:
This material can be obtained by compressing a large amount of coke powder and processing it at high temperatures.

If you just craft it, you will need 4 HOP graphite powder, but if you use an arc furnace, you can craft it with just one.

This is a necessary material to make Mekanism machines.
ze.quest.72.title: watch your hands
ze.quest.72.subtitle: metal compressor
ze.quest.72.des:
Metals can be processed according to the shape of the metal compression mold.

Metal Molds can be created in the Engineer's Workbench based on the Metal Mold Blueprint.

Check the engineer's manual or search for metal compressors to find out how to build one.
ze.quest.73.title: furnace v2
ze.quest.73.subtitle: tempered furnace
ze.quest.73.des:
It looks great compared to traditional furnaces. Additionally, dedicated input/output ports have been added and attachments can be added to speed up the furnace.

For crafting instructions, check the Engineer's Manual or search for Reinforced Furnace.
ze.quest.74.title: Furnace DLC
ze.quest.74.subtitle: furnace preheater
ze.quest.74.des: It can be attached to either side of a reinforced furnace and provides power to increase the furnace speed.
ze.quest.75.title: In search of black gold
ze.quest.75.subtitle: seismic exploration tool
ze.quest.75.des:
Seismic exploration tools are needed to find oil. When installed on the floor and activated with a pellet cartridge, the pellets are fired to the floor and create a shock wave.

Seismic results can be used to identify nearby oil-containing water veins. The dots will gradually become widely distributed around the black dot in the center, but if there is a water vein, there will be unnatural areas where there are almost no dots. This is a sign that there is a water vein there.

Not all water veins are oil. You will need to check the seismic results of that chunk to see what liquid is present. If you find oil, check out the next quest.
ze.quest.76.title: blender without blades
ze.quest.76.subtitle: mixer
ze.quest.76.des: It is mainly used to mix items into liquids and process them into new liquids.
ze.quest.77.title: insert a straw
ze.quest.77.subtitle: derrick
ze.quest.77.des:
Once you've found a chunk of oil, you need to build a machine to extract it.

Once you install the derrick and connect power, it will display the supplies you need. Get your fluid pipes, water, and liquid concrete ready.

If the derrick is piped to an oil deposit, preparations must be made to store the oil that is spewing out under hydraulic pressure. Otherwise, the oil will leak out and disappear.

If all the oil has spewed out or is not coming out at first, read the Drill Quest below.
ze.quest.78.title: sucking bone marrow
ze.quest.78.subtitle: drilling machine
ze.quest.78.des: If you remove a derrick that is no longer producing oil, there will be a concrete-encased pipe at the bottom. When the driller is properly installed and operated, the driller pumps out the remaining oil.
ze.quest.79.title: gald cup
ze.quest.79.subtitle: distillation tower
ze.quest.79.des:
Crude oil is distilled and separated into four types of oil. Since these four oils come from one output area, we recommend using a fluid pipe (Immersive Engineering) or a fluid router that can transport multiple liquids in one pipe. Additionally, bitumen comes out as residue, and when it becomes full, the distillation column stops working.

Lubricant can be sprayed on some machines to increase their speed. Alternatively, it can be refined into sulfurized light oil in a high-pressure refiner.
Sulfurized diesel can be used as fuel as is, but the sulfur can be removed separately through a high-pressure refiner and refined into diesel.
Kerosene can be distilled one more time and refined into sulfurized light oil and benzol.
Naphtha can be refined into gasoline with benzol in a refiner or into petroleum gas in a high-pressure refiner.
ze.quest.80.title: Hwang is out.
ze.quest.80.subtitle: high pressure purifier
ze.quest.80.des:
It is typically used to extract sulfur from sulfurized diesel oil by consuming water, and is also used to refine other oils.

Water is input from the top and oil is input from the side.
ze.quest.81.title: Not a rice cooker
ze.quest.81.subtitle: cocker
ze.quest.81.des:
Bitumen can be mixed with water and processed into sulfurized diesel and petroleum coke. Petroleum coke can be obtained from two locations at the bottom of the machine, and sulfurized diesel fuel can be extracted from the front outlet (orange). At this time, this sulfurized diesel oil has different components from the sulfurized diesel oil from the distillation tower, so it does not mix. It is recommended that it be processed into regular light oil through additional processing.

Petroleum coke can be used in the same way as conventional coke.

You can also craft steel casings using petroleum coke blocks, which can be crafted twice as much as the regular recipe.
And when petroleum coke powder is compressed at ultra-high temperatures, it becomes fluorite powder.

The Coker is a very large multi-block machine. Because there are many confusing parts during construction, we recommend giving up on shaders for a while and building through the projector.
ze.quest.82.title: Mechanism
ze.quest.82.subtitle: steel casing
ze.quest.82.des:
You are ready to tackle Mekanism technology, the technology of the world you lived in. You'll have to pour all the machines and resources you've built into it.

As Mekanism machines are high-level technologies, most of them provide good performance even in a relatively small space. Additionally, power is relatively stable as it is transported in pipes rather than wires.

You can make two steel casings using a block of petroleum coke.
ze.quest.83.title: Maltong
ze.quest.83.subtitle: jerry can
ze.quest.83.des:
This is a portable liquid storage device with a capacity of 1,000 mB (10 buckets). Instead, the liquid must be injected through a machine (such as an injector).
When combined with a tool that requires refueling, the tool will be refueled immediately.
ze.quest.84.title: eco-friendly
ze.quest.84.subtitle: biodiesel
ze.quest.84.des: It is a highly efficient fuel processed through plants.
ze.quest.85.title: environmental pollution
ze.quest.85.subtitle: diesel generator
ze.quest.85.des: It consumes oil and produces loud noise and power.
ze.quest.86.title: My drill is a drill that drills through the floor!
ze.quest.86.subtitle: mining drill
ze.quest.86.des:
This is a portable drill that operates by consuming oil. It is mainly used for mining, and the level of blocks that can be mined and the mining range vary depending on the drill head.

The engineer's workbench can be equipped with a drill head and several attachments.
ze.quest.87.title: I'm not going to Raven Home...
ze.quest.87.subtitle: circular saw
ze.quest.87.des:
This is a portable saw that operates by consuming oil. It is mainly used for cutting down trees, and can also cut stones depending on the saw blade.

The Engineer's Workbench can be equipped with a saw blade and several attachments.
ze.quest.88.title: Thank you, dinosaur!
ze.quest.88.subtitle: (sulfurized) diesel fuel
ze.quest.88.des:
It is a fuel that can be used by distilling petroleum, and sulfur can be removed through additional processing. If it's bothersome, you can just use it. It's just a slight loss.

As an aside, it is said that most of the oil is made from trees, not dinosaurs, but dinosaurs are more interesting than trees, so let's stop this debate.
ze.quest.89.title: The dawn that burned many stars
ze.quest.89.subtitle: meteorite
ze.quest.89.des:
If you walk around a bit, you will see a large, black meteorite that has fallen to the ground. Dig through the center above to find an unidentifiable cube and a sprouting Certus Quartz.

You'll likely need a lot of Certus Quartz, so just dig up the cubes and keep the quartz blocks.
ze.quest.90.title: cram training
ze.quest.90.subtitle: metallurgical injector
ze.quest.90.des:
It is a machine that mainly makes alloys by injecting substances into metal.

You can also craft steel by injecting carbon twice into an iron ingot. In the future, if carbon is efficiently processed and used through a machine called a concentrator, it will be possible to produce steel with less resources than existing methods.
ze.quest.91.title: as i modified
ze.quest.91.subtitle: setting device
ze.quest.91.des: It is mainly used to adjust or safely remove the input and output of Mekanism's machines or pipes, etc. You can select the desired operation method by holding it in your hand and pressing B.
ze.quest.92.title: Fluid Mechanics v3
ze.quest.92.subtitle: Mechanical pipes and liquid tanks
ze.quest.92.des: In the form of a pipe, it is a means of transporting liquid and has a good transport speed even without a separate pump.
ze.quest.93.title: industrial revolution v3
ze.quest.93.subtitle: Logistics transporters and single-item warehouses
ze.quest.93.des: In the form of a pipe, it is a means of transporting items. A single item warehouse is a warehouse that can store a very large number of one item.
ze.quest.94.title: Electrical Engineering v2
ze.quest.94.subtitle: Universal wires and energy cubes
ze.quest.94.des: In the form of a pipe, it is a means of transporting electricity.
ze.quest.95.title: electrolysis
ze.quest.95.subtitle: electrolytic separator
ze.quest.95.des: It is a machine that breaks down liquid or gas electrically.
ze.quest.96.title: aerodynamics
ze.quest.96.subtitle: High pressure tubes and chemical tanks
ze.quest.96.des: In the form of a pipe, it is a means of transporting gas.
ze.quest.97.title: boil water
ze.quest.97.subtitle: thermal evaporation device
ze.quest.97.des:
This is a device that produces salt water by evaporating water using solar power. Due to its large size, this device must be manufactured in multi-block form. Installation instructions are on the next page.

Thermal evaporation valves can receive or expel liquid and can also receive heat.

The device pierces the ceiling so you can see the sky, supplies water, and when the temperature exceeds 300k, the supplied water is converted into salt water. The temperature changes depending on the time of day and the biome it is installed in, and if you want to provide more heat, you can install an advanced solar generator in the corner of the top floor or supply heat to a thermal evaporation valve.

If you don't yet have the resources to install a high-end solar generator, you can generate heat directly using electricity with an electric resistance heater.
ze.quest.97.des2:
As shown in the photo below, lay a 4*4 floor with thermal evaporation device blocks, and build a wall on top of it with thermal evaporation blocks, including the thermal evaporation controller and thermal evaporation valve. At this time, the edges must also be filled. Then, install 8 thermal evaporation device blocks (i.e. excluding the corners) on the top floor to complete it.

When complete, the thermal evaporation controller will display a screen and redstone particles will appear throughout the device.

The quest requires the minimum amount of units to be built, but you can build them higher (up to 18 spaces) if you wish. Additionally, parts other than the corners can be replaced with structural glass to allow viewing of the interior.
ze.quest.98.title: electric heater
ze.quest.98.subtitle: electric resistance heater
ze.quest.98.des: It is a machine that converts electricity into heat. Heat can be discharged through the green ports on both sides.
ze.quest.99.title: thermodynamics
ze.quest.99.subtitle: heat conductor
ze.quest.99.des: In the form of a pipe, it is a means of transporting heat.
ze.quest.100.title: Gas gas gas!
ze.quest.100.subtitle: chemical reaction device
ze.quest.100N.des: This is a machine that mixes two gases to create a new gas.
ze.quest.101.title: Vaporization/Liquefaction
ze.quest.101.subtitle: rotating condenser
ze.quest.101.des: A machine that converts liquid into gas and vice versa.
ze.quest.102.title: oxidation
ze.quest.102.subtitle: chemical oxidation device
ze.quest.102.des: This is a machine that oxidizes solid substances into gas.
ze.quest.103.title: double
ze.quest.103.subtitle: concentrator
ze.quest.103.des:
It is a machine that doubles ores (blocks) into powder form, and has other functions besides refining minerals.

For example, materials for redstone or carbon to be injected into a metallurgy injector can be processed and injected through a concentrator with much higher efficiency. Redstone is only charged at 10mB, but concentrated redstone made by concentrating one redstone with a concentrator can be charged at 80mB. It provides almost 8 times the efficiency.
ze.quest.104.title: three times
ze.quest.104.subtitle: purifier and crusher
ze.quest.104.des:
A purifier is a machine that triples ores (blocks) into lumps with oxygen.

Oxygen can be obtained by putting it in an electrolytic separator.
The grinder can process adulterated powders and has other functions as well.

It can then be refined into regular powder using a concentrator.
ze.quest.105.title: quadruple
ze.quest.105.subtitle: chemical dosing device
ze.quest.105.des:
A chemical dosing device is a machine that quadruples ore (blocks) into fragments using hydrogen chloride.

Hydrogen chloride can be obtained by adding salt to a purifier, or it can be produced by combining hydrogen and chlorine in a chemical reaction device. Chlorine can be obtained by adding salt water to an electrolytic separator.

It can then be processed into lumps with a purifier, processed into powder mixed with impurities with a grinder, and then refined into powder with a concentrator.
ze.quest.106.title: five times
ze.quest.106.subtitle: Chemical dissolution, washing, crystallization device
ze.quest.106.des:
The chemical dissolution device is a machine that processes 1,000 mB of ore (blocks) into a slurry mixed with impurities using gaseous sulfuric acid.
A chemical cleaning device is a machine that uses water to clean slurry mixed with impurities into pure slurry.
A chemical crystallizer is a machine that processes 200 mB of pure slurry into crystals.

Gaseous sulfuric acid can be converted directly into gaseous sulfuric acid in a purifier, or alternatively, it can be processed into sulfur dioxide in a chemical oxidation device, combined with oxygen in a chemical reaction device to create sulfur trioxide, and then combined in a chemical reaction device with water vapor vaporized in a rotating condenser.

A good way to obtain sulfur is to extract sulfur from sulfurized diesel oil produced by processing petroleum through a high-pressure refiner.

It can then be processed into fragments with a chemical injection device, processed into lumps with a purifier, processed into powder mixed with impurities with a grinder, and then refined into powder with a concentrator.
ze.quest.107.title: dynamic tank
ze.quest.107.subtitle: dynamic tank
ze.quest.107.des:
This is a multi-block tank that can store large amounts of liquid or gas.

Input and output are possible through structural blocks.

It can be constructed as shown in the photo below, and all sides except the corners can be replaced with dynamic valves or structural glass. To increase capacity, simply increase the size. Additionally, as long as it has the shape of a rectangular parallelepiped with an empty interior, it can be built in a minimum size of 3*3*3 and a maximum size of 18*18*18.
ze.quest.109.title: tank
ze.quest.109.subtitle: fluid tank
ze.quest.109.des:
It is a multi-block structure that can store more liquid than Create's liquid tank of the same size. Liquid can be injected from the top or bottom, and the liquid can be drained by sending a redstone signal to the bottom port.

Check your engineer's manual or search for fluid tanks for construction instructions.
ze.quest.110.title: Bulk storage of a single variety
ze.quest.110.subtitle: item silo
ze.quest.110.des:
It is a multi-block structure that can store many items of one type. Items can be placed in the upper part (requires additional elements such as a hopper), and items can be taken out by giving a redstone signal to the lower part.

For crafting instructions, check the Engineer's Manual or search the item silo.
ze.quest.111.title: Swimming pool not good for swimming
ze.quest.111.subtitle: oil tank
ze.quest.111.des:
This tank can hold more oil than a regular tank and can be expanded.

For construction instructions, check the engineer's manual or search for the oil tank.
ze.quest.112.title: It's not as good as Draconic, but
ze.quest.112.subtitle: inductive matrix
ze.quest.112.des:
It is a multi-block storage battery that can store much more power than an energy cube.

Inside the matrix, there must be an inductive cell to store power and an inductive supply to send and receive power. Additionally, for input/output, you must set the input/output mode of the inductive port using a setting device.

It can be constructed as shown in the photo below, and the sides except the corners can be replaced with induction ports or structural glass. To increase capacity or input/output, the rank or number of each cell must be increased. In addition, as long as it has the shape of a rectangular parallelepiped, it can be built with a minimum size of 3*3*3 (but because the induction cell and feeder are included, one axis can accommodate 4 people) and a maximum size of 18*18*18.
ze.quest.113.title: Let’s burn the sea of ​​stars!
ze.quest.113.subtitle: geothermal generator
ze.quest.113.des: It can be developed into combustible items or liquids, or can be generated in small but infinite amounts from the heat of adjacent lava. Power can be extracted through the green port on the side.
ze.quest.114.title: flirt
ze.quest.114.subtitle: wind generator
ze.quest.114.des: Generates power in proportion to the installed Y coordinate.
ze.quest.115.title: The generously giving sun
ze.quest.115.subtitle: solar generator
ze.quest.115.des: If the sky is open and sunlight hits it, it generates electricity.
ze.quest.116.title: The sun that gives without reserve
ze.quest.116.subtitle: advanced solar generator
ze.quest.116.des: It is an advanced type of solar power generator and can also be used as a heat source for a thermal evaporation device.
ze.quest.117.title: Get some exercise!
ze.quest.117.subtitle: exercise generator
ze.quest.117.des:
It is a kinetic generator, one of the methods of producing electricity using Immersive Engineering in the beginning.

Connect a windmill or water wheel to the side (large black circle), and when they turn, the power is converted to electricity. Attaching windmill sails to windmill blades further increases efficiency.
Windmills operate at their highest efficiency in empty space, spinning at higher speeds to produce power in windy, rainy or thunderstorm weather.

The efficiency of a water wheel changes depending on the water flow it touches.
ze.quest.118.title: hot iced americano
ze.quest.118.subtitle: thermoelectric generator
ze.quest.118.des: The greater the temperature difference between the blocks or liquids installed on the sides, the more electricity is generated. For blocks that affect temperature, search the Engineer's Manual for thermoelectric generator.
ze.quest.119.title: Walk confidently anywhere
ze.quest.119.subtitle: free runner
ze.quest.119.des:
When charged and equipped with electricity, fall damage is negated by consuming electricity (this does not apply to damage from falling into the void). It can also automatically climb one block.

You can change the mode or turn it on and off by pressing ,(<).
ze.quest.120.title: Walk confidently anywhere v2
ze.quest.120.subtitle: armed free runner
ze.quest.120.des: Armors the Free Runner for added defense.
ze.quest.121.title: human rocket
ze.quest.121.subtitle: jetpack
ze.quest.121.des:
Once you charge and wear hydrogen, you can fly by consuming the hydrogen by pressing the space bar.

You can press K to change modes or turn it on and off. In normal mode, you can only climb by pressing the space bar, and in flight maintenance mode, you can continue to consume hydrogen at the height you climbed by pressing the space bar to maintain that height and descend by crouching.
ze.quest.122.title: human rocket v2
ze.quest.122.subtitle: armored jetpack
ze.quest.122.des: Armor your jetpack for added protection.
ze.quest.123.title: Atomics
ze.quest.123.subtitle: protective clothing set
ze.quest.123.des:
Welcome to fission level technology. Uranium can now be processed into fuel, which can be used to generate heat to spin turbines to produce enormous amounts of power. And more importantly, polonium, plutonium grains or antimatter can be obtained by refining nuclear waste after nuclear fission.

You will need space for two large multi-block structures and some minor production equipment. When the reactor is damaged or something goes wrong, the radioactivity that leaks out contaminates the surrounding chunks, so it is recommended to build it a little further away from the main house site. Well, if you are confident, you can ignore it.

Aside from the materials needed for multi-block structures, the resources you need to prepare include large amounts of water, uranium, and fluorite.

Before you begin, prepare for any possible radiation leak by wearing a set of protective clothing.
ze.quest.124.title: a practical generator
ze.quest.124.subtitle: industrial turbine
ze.quest.124.des:
Steam pressure turns a turbine to produce a lot of power. It receives steam (gas) through two or more turbine valves and expels the used steam in the form of water (liquid).

If it is full of power and can't let it out, it will stop working.
ze.quest.124.des2:
First of all, it is recommended to be placed close to the reactor

After making a border with the turbine casing, install the turbine rotor in the center and attach the turbine blades. A rotating mechanism is installed directly above the turbine rotor and surrounded by a pressure distributor.
Then, an electromagnetic coil and a saturated condenser are stacked on top of it, and the outside is wrapped with a steam outlet. To finish, install the turbine valve and structural glass or turbine casing on the remaining surface.

If everything is completed, redstone particles will appear. Please note that this is an example size and can be made larger or smaller.
ze.quest.125.title: core meltdown
ze.quest.125.subtitle: nuclear pile
ze.quest.125.des:
It consumes nuclear fuel and produces enormous amounts of heat. This boils the coolant (water) into steam. You must receive nuclear fuel (gas) and coolant (liquid) through the reactor ports, and export the vaporized coolant (gas) and nuclear waste (gas) generated after consuming the nuclear fuel.

If the coolant drops below zero during operation, the reactor will fail and radioactivity will begin to leak.
ze.quest.125.des2:
First of all, it is recommended to be placed close to industrial turbines

After making a border with the reactor casing, the floor is laid with fusion reactor glass or reactor casing, and then the nuclear fission fuel components are installed and stacked on top of it so that they do not face each other.

Place the control shaft configurator on top of the nuclear fission fuel configurator and cover the remaining side with the reactor port and fusion reactor glass or reactor casing.

If everything is completed, redstone particles will appear. Please note that this is an example size and can be made larger or smaller.
ze.quest.126.title: nuclear fuel production
ze.quest.126.subtitle: Isotope centrifuge
ze.quest.126.des:
Uranium hexafluoride is needed to make nuclear fuel in an isotope centrifuge.

It is made by combining hydrofluoric acid and uranium oxide in a chemical reaction device.

Hydrofluoric acid can be obtained by dissolving fluorspar in gaseous sulfuric acid in a chemical dissolution device, and uranium oxide can be obtained by concentrating uranium ingots in a concentrator and oxidizing the uranium salt produced in a chemical oxidation device.

Fluorspar can be found underground as a mineral, and if you process petroleum, you can process it by compressing 9 pieces of petroleum coke powder at very high temperatures.
ze.quest.127.title: waste disposal
ze.quest.127.subtitle: Solar neutron activator and pressurized reactor and radioactive waste bin
ze.quest.127.des:
Nuclear waste can be processed into polonium in a solar neutron reactor and into plutonium in an isotope centrifuge.

Polonium and plutonium can be obtained by processing fluorite powder with water in a pressurized reaction device, respectively, to obtain polonium and plutonium grains. These processes generate spent nuclear waste.

If used nuclear waste is stored in a radioactive waste bin, waste is removed at a rate of 1 per second.

All gases released during this process are radioactive, so please be careful when handling them.
ze.quest.128.title: Nuclear Fission Checklist
ze.quest.128.subtitle: reactor operation
ze.quest.128.des:
Now you need to connect high pressure tubes or mechanical pipes to each machine or device. At this time, the tubes and pipes used must be of the ultimate grade for safety. Otherwise, the transmission volume cannot keep up with the throughput, which may cause radiation leakage.

First, we need to connect the nuclear reactor and the industrial turbine. Crouch and right-click on the port where you want to discharge coolant (steam) with the setting device, change to coolant discharge mode, and connect it to the turbine valve with a high-pressure tube. Next, water (liquid) is routed from the steam outlet of the industrial turbine into mechanical pipes to the reactor ports in input-only mode. Doing so ends the connection between the reactor and turbine.

In addition, coolant is added in advance by filling water in another input-only port of the reactor. The port in nuclear waste (gas) release mode is then connected to a device that will dispose of the waste, such as a solar neutron activator.

Lastly, you will need to connect a general-purpose wire to the turbine valve that will export the electricity produced by the industrial turbine. It is recommended to connect it to the induction matrix in case it is full of power. And finally, the preparation is complete once nuclear fuel (gas) is supplied through the reactor port.
ze.quest.128.des2:
Right-click the reactor to open the interface, click the information icon on the left, adjust the maximum combustion speed appropriately (15 is recommended), then come back and click Activate to start the reactor. When first operating, water in the coolant tank may be consumed, but under normal circumstances, the consumption will stop at a certain level. (If it continues to decrease, make an emergency stop and lower the combustion speed.

If everything is working properly and there are no radiation leaks, congratulations. Lots of power and premium materials are now yours. And a little bit of anxiety too.
ze.quest.129.des3: For reference, this method is a water-cooled cooling method that uses only a nuclear reactor and turbine. Constructing and connecting a thermal current boiler between the nuclear reactor and the industrial turbine allows the use of sodium cooling. It can cool the heat of the nuclear reactor more efficiently than water cooling at the same scale.
ze.quest.129.title: gun imports
ze.quest.129.subtitle: Gun Durability
ze.quest.129.des:
The more you fire the gun, the more its durability wears down. (Same applies to attachments)
The lower the durability, the lower the overall stats of the gun.

Steel can be repaired at the anvil as a material.
ze.quest.130.title: Antimatter Fabrication
ze.quest.130.subtitle: Supercritical phase transition device
ze.quest.130.des:
It seems that antimatter production, which has not been achieved in your world, is possible.

You can create antimatter by building a supercritical phase transition device and injecting it with enough (very much) power and polonium. You can obtain antimatter grains by consuming 1000 mB in a chemical crystallizer.

Low production speed? This is mostly due to lack of power.
ze.quest.130.des2:
It must be built in the shape of a sphere measuring 7*7*7. Simply create a border with SPS casing and fill it with SPS ports and structural glass or SPS casing on all sides.

At least a total of 3 ports are required. There must be a port in input mode to put flonium and power in, and a port in output mode to send out antimatter (gas). This can be changed by right-clicking on the potty while crouching with the settings device.

The important thing is that the port that receives power must have an overcharge coil attached to the other side for it to work.
ze.quest.131.title: AE Type Charger
ze.quest.131.subtitle: charger
ze.quest.131.des: Injects AE unit power into the item and charges it. If you don't have an element to generate power, you can generate a small amount of power by attaching a wooden handle on top and turning it.
ze.quest.132.title: Do not overcharge!
ze.quest.132.subtitle: Charged Certus Quartz Crystal
ze.quest.132.des: You can obtain a Charged Certooth Quartz Crystal by charging it with a charger. These crystals have their own electricity and can be used to create certain items. For example, if you throw some materials into the water, you can obtain new resources.
ze.quest.133.title: Quartz can be copied!
ze.quest.133.subtitle: Budding Certus Quartz
ze.quest.133.des:
Certooth Quartz is an essential resource for crafting AE devices and is created from sprouting Certooth Quartz.

There are different grades of Certus Quartz that sprout, and the speed at which they sprout differs. Except for the flawless grade, the grade gradually deteriorates each time they sprout, ultimately preventing them from sprouting. If you mine sprouting Certus Quartz with a pickaxe, you will get Quartz of one grade lower. If you mine it with a pickaxe enchanted with Silk Touch, you can obtain it at its original grade, but if it is the highest grade quartz, it will be demoted to the flawed quartz level, which is one level lower.

It would be wise to keep it inside the meteorite as much as possible, but if necessary, dig it up with an axe enchanted with Silk Touch.

A trick is to right-click on the quartz with a pickaxe in your main hand and a cardboard box of Mekanism in your other hand to wrap it. You can obtain it by mining it, and after installing it in the desired location, crouch and right-click to install the contents. Regardless of grade.
ze.quest.134.title: broker
ze.quest.134.subtitle: energy receptors
ze.quest.134.des: When dealing with some AE machines or ME systems, a power system called AE units is used. This device is required to use power from other modes of the machine.
ze.quest.135.title: Overcharge? What do you mean?-
ze.quest.135.subtitle: liquid crystal crystal
ze.quest.135.des: When you throw a charged Certooth Quartz Crystal, Redstone, and Nether Quartz into water (or some liquid), the Certooth Quartz emits electricity and turns into a liquid crystal. Liquid crystal crystals are used to make AE devices and are mainly used in power-related devices.
ze.quest.136.title: Fiber optic cable (not)
ze.quest.136.subtitle: Liquid crystal ME glass cable
ze.quest.136.des: This is the basic wire of the AE power system. It is possible to transfer data not only from electric wires but also from ME systems.
ze.quest.137.title: Prohibited for use other than intended use
ze.quest.137.subtitle: vibration chamber
ze.quest.137.des: If you haven't built a proper generator yet, this might help. When a combustible item is burned, resonance occurs inside and generates AE electricity. It could be useful as an emergency generator.
ze.quest.138.title: crystal kicker
ze.quest.138.subtitle: growth accelerator
ze.quest.138.des:
When sprouted, it attaches to Certus Quartz and continues to apply AE power, it noticeably accelerates the quartz production rate of the attached quartz. Amethyst is also available.

Please note that it only receives power from up and down.
ze.quest.139.title: Alien semiconductor technology
ze.quest.139.subtitle: circuit printing machine
ze.quest.139.des: Circuit presses obtained from meteorites made it possible to manufacture circuits and processors. It is used as a basic part of AE machines.
ze.quest.140.title: Please note that there is no channel system here.
ze.quest.140.subtitle: ME controller
ze.quest.140.des: The ME controller, the heart of the ME system at the core of this technology, also acts as an energy receptor and can check connected devices at once and the overall power status of the system.
ze.quest.141.title: charger
ze.quest.141.subtitle: charging station
ze.quest.141.des:
Charges power to tools or other items that require power.
Connect the power source to the back or bottom and insert the item to be charged to begin charging.

The three tubes in front emit light, and the color changes from red to green in proportion to the amount of charge.
ze.quest.142.title: osmium
ze.quest.142.subtitle: osmium compressor
ze.quest.142.des: Certain powders are infused with osmium.
ze.quest.143.title: High-grade obsidian
ze.quest.143.subtitle: Refined Obsidian Ingot
ze.quest.143.des:
This material is used as parts or materials for high-end machines. It is completed by infusing obsidian powder with diamonds and adding osmium.

Can be processed with an osmium injector.
ze.quest.144.title: Key ingredients for teleportation
ze.quest.144.subtitle: teleportation core
ze.quest.144.des:
Teleportation technology can now be used using the quantum entanglement singularity.

Or... you can open a door to a new world by throwing it into a well with lots of plants nearby.
ze.quest.145.title: Tesseract
ze.quest.145.subtitle: quantum transmitter
ze.quest.145.des:
It is a means of transportation that can transmit items, liquids, power, gases, heat, etc. over long distances (regardless of distance).

Quantum transmitters on the same channel are connected.
ze.quest.146.title: portal
ze.quest.146.subtitle: teleporter
ze.quest.146.des:
A teleporter is a device that teleports entities, including playies, to a selected teleporter.

Connect 7 or more teleporter frames (large enough to fit a person) to a teleporter to create a portal-type appearance and set the teleporter at the destination to open the portal. If you want to return, just connect the teleporter frame to the teleporter at the arrival point.

Portable Teleporter is a tool that allows you to specify the teleporter of the desired channel and move directly there.
ze.quest.147.title: This is a real mining machine.
ze.quest.147.subtitle: digital miner
ze.quest.147.des:
If you set the range and cal block, the blocks within the range will be dug up.

Power can be supplied through ports on both sides, and when you right-click to open the UI, there are several buttons.

You can automatically send and receive items through ports connected to the back or top, and you can also set whether to apply delicate touches to mined blocks.

To use it properly, you must press the settings button to set the mining range and things to mine. The range refers to the horizontal range centered on the miner, and the minimum and maximum set the height range.

A digital miner must set the block to be mined. You can mine everything except the blocks you set via inversion mode, but doing so will waste power and time. You can specify items by clicking Add new filter. If you want to mine only minerals, select the tag and enter forge:ores to set it to mine all minerals.

If you save the filter, you are ready, but if you activate it right away, only the minerals will be mined, leaving the space where the minerals were empty, which may cause unnecessary monster spawning. To solve this, designate a replacement item (block) in the blank space at the bottom left and supply it to the digital miner. The miner will mine and then install the block in its place.
ze.quest.148.title: density exceeded
ze.quest.148.subtitle: Matter condenser and singularity
ze.quest.148.des:
A substance condenser is a device that condenses items or liquids. Depending on the setting, it can be used as a trash can or can be used to make ammunition for a material cannon. But the most important thing is that you can create a side advantage.

To create a ball of matter or singularity, you will need an element to hold the liquid, an item to be condensed into it. In the case of a singularity, a minimum of 64k ME storage elements are required, as 256,000 materials must be put into it.

To put materials into the material condenser, you can put job items in them, and you can also put items and liquids in them using belts or pipes.
ze.quest.149.title: quantum mechanics
ze.quest.149.subtitle: quantum entanglement singularity
ze.quest.149.des:
You can create a pair of Quantum Entanglement Singularities by throwing a Singularity and an Ender Pearl or Ender Powder in the form of an item on the floor and causing an explosion.

This singularity allows the creation of devices capable of teleportation across space, and a pair of these singularities can be used to connect ME systems wirelessly over long distances.

It seems like the quest icons overlap? Wouldn’t it be quantum tunneling?
ze.quest.150.title: ME quantum network
ze.quest.150.subtitle: ME quantum loops and linkers
ze.quest.150.des:
A quantum network bridge is completed by installing the ME quantum connector and wrapping the ME quantum ring around it.

Connect this to the ME system, connect one of the paired quantum entanglement singularities, create the same quantum network bridge at the desired location, and plug in the remaining quantum entanglement singularity. This will link it with the ME system from a distance and even transmit and receive AE power.

It even works in other dimensions.
ze.quest.151.title: liquid disk
ze.quest.151.subtitle: ME liquid storage cell
ze.quest.151.des:
It can store liquid and can store 1024 bytes of 18 types.

If the contents of a cell are empty, you can disassemble it into ME storage elements by holding it in your hand, crouching, and right-clicking.

Even if you increase the capacity, the types that can be stored do not increase.
ze.quest.152.title: item disc
ze.quest.152.subtitle: ME storage cell
ze.quest.152.des:
Items can be stored and 63 types can be stored in 1024 bytes.

If the contents of a cell are empty, you can disassemble it into ME storage elements by holding it in your hand, crouching, and right-clicking.

Even if you increase the capacity, the types that can be stored do not increase.
ze.quest.153.title: gas disk
ze.quest.153.subtitle: ME Chemical Storage Cell
ze.quest.153.des:
It can store gases and can store 1024 bytes of 5 types.

If the contents of a cell are empty, you can disassemble it into ME storage elements by holding it in your hand, crouching, and right-clicking.

Even if you increase the capacity, the types that can be stored do not increase.
ze.quest.154.title: disk storage
ze.quest.154.subtitle: ME Drive
ze.quest.154.des:
One of the main technologies of ME systems is the ability to convert objects into data and store them in cells.

The cells must be mounted on an ME drive to be able to connect and manage them directly to the ME system.
ze.quest.155.title: Moving data
ze.quest.155.subtitle: ME input/output port
ze.quest.155.des:
You will need this device to transfer contents between drives.

You can move data from cells in the ME drive to the ME input/output port or vice versa.

It will mainly be used to transfer contents to a larger drive.
ze.quest.156.title: From now on your name is ME Storage
ze.quest.156.subtitle: ME storage bus
ze.quest.156.des:
If you want to link your original Jazingo to the ME system, you can do so by installing this ME storage bus.

There is no need to bother creating storage cells. Of course, in the spatial aspect, you will eventually have to create cells.
ze.quest.157.title: monitor
ze.quest.157.subtitle: ME combination terminal
ze.quest.157.des: To be exact, it would be a monitor, keyboard and mouse. You will need this terminal to store or remove items from the ME system. If you make it a combination terminal, you can even combine it right away.
ze.quest.158.title: Non-face-to-face warehouse
ze.quest.158.subtitle: ME wireless access point and wireless combination terminal
ze.quest.158.des:
There is no need to go to the terminal to insert or remove items. You can remotely access the ME system by installing the ME wireless access point, charging the wireless terminal, and registering it. However, since the access point has a maximum distance, you must upgrade the wireless base station to increase the distance.

The available distance increases proportionally to the number of wireless base stations installed. Instead, power usage also increases.

You can open the wireless terminal right away by inserting it into the accessory slot and pressing Ctrl+`(~).
ze.quest.159.title: unlimited limit
ze.quest.159.subtitle: Base station with unlimited distance
ze.quest.159.des:
It will take a lot of power and resources to keep adding wireless base stations, so try making something more expensive and plug it in.

Equipped with an unlimited-distance base station, you can connect anywhere on the same level and only require a small amount of additional power.
ze.quest.160.title: Unlimited Limit+
ze.quest.160.subtitle: dimensional base station
ze.quest.160.des:
The only downside to unlimited range base stations is that you cannot connect to them if you are in a different dimension. Then you can upgrade by spending more resources.

Power requirements are the same as for an unlimited range base station.
ze.quest.161.title: The first step in ME automatic combination
ze.quest.161.subtitle: ME pattern terminal and empty pattern
ze.quest.161.des:
You are ready to create an automated assembly process, which is one of the reasons to use AE.

First, you must upload an empty pattern in the ME pattern terminal and register the combination method of the item to be registered in automatic combination. You can place the items you have or drag them from EMI (items shown on the right). Once complete, you can click the pattern encoding icon to engrave the pattern.

In addition to the recipe for a workbench, you can also register recipes for machines including a furnace, a blacksmith's workbench, or a stone cutter.

To register a combination recipe for a furnace or machines, you must click the furnace icon and then register the inputs and results. Unlike other combination patterns, they must be registered manually, due to the characteristics of this automatic combination method.
ze.quest.161.des2:
The workbench icon (Crafting Patterns) method loads the recipe as is, so you can apply the combination method as is. However, a separate machine is required for this combination.
The automatic combination of the furnace icon (Processing Patterns) method operates in the manner of 'I don't know what this machine does, but if I put this in, this is what comes out', so automatic combination involves inserting the input and waiting for the item to come out of the machine and enter the ME system. If the pattern is not written properly, the automatic combination process will enter an infinite wait state.

For the remaining icons, the pattern engraving method is the same as the workbench icon, but the actual operation method is no different from the furnace icon.
ze.quest.162.title: calculating machine
ze.quest.162.subtitle: Recipe storage and combination auxiliary processing unit
ze.quest.162.des:
When automatic combination is performed, the combination method storage is responsible for calculating the quantity of materials and results needed and where the materials should be supplied. The more complex the material, the greater the recipe storage capacity required.

The combination processing unit is not required, but when attached to the recipe storage, it is an auxiliary calculation device that allows multiple combinations to be combined at the same time if possible.

These can only work if they are connected in a rectangular shape.
ze.quest.163.title: administrative supply officer
ze.quest.163.subtitle: ME pattern feeder
ze.quest.163.des:
When a request for automatic combination is received with a pattern engraved on the ME pattern feeder, automatic combination is possible by supplying materials to the machine attached to the side.

It can be mounted on all machines on the touching surface in block form, or it can be applied to only one block in panel form.

When the ME pattern feeder supplies materials to the machine, automatic combination begins, and the automatic combination is recognized as complete only when all results enter the ME system by any means, including the pattern feeder.

You can manage all patterns connected to the ME system through the ME pattern access terminal that you will receive as a reward.
ze.quest.164.title: automatic workbench
ze.quest.164.subtitle: molecular combiner
ze.quest.164.des: If you're going to do automatic assembly on your bench, this machine is almost essential. When AE power is supplied and automatic combination commands and patterns are commanded from the ME pattern feeder next to it, the molecular combiner automatically receives the materials and outputs the results to the ME system through the pattern feeder.
ze.quest.165.title: Tricky block placement and destruction
ze.quest.165.subtitle: ME extinction plane and creation plane
ze.quest.165.des: Simply put, the Vanish Plane destroys blocks it encounters or absorbs items and stores them in the ME system. The creation side removes the set item from the ME system and installs it or drops it as an item. However, these are a bit tricky to use.
ze.quest.165.des2:
The Vanishing Plane can be enchanted. Good luck, the delicate touch works the way you know it, its efficiency and durability save the power used when the plane operates. 

To set up blocks to break, you cannot set them on the plane itself, but instead you have to filter them separately on the connected storage. To use this properly, you can configure it through a separate box, for example by placing an ME storage bus (not an incoming bus) on the box and specifying on it which blocks the destruction plane will destroy. And if it is connected to the destruction plane, the destruction plane will only destroy the blocks you set.
If you want to keep it in the ME system, you can import the item into the ME system with an inflow bus on the other side. Additionally, when setting up a block, you must set it based on the item obtained by destroying the block that the extinction plane destroys, not based on the installed block. For example, if you break a stone block, you will get a cobblestone, but in this case, you need to set the cobblestone. Naturally, if it is an extinction plane with a subtle touch, the stone blocks should be set as is.
ze.quest.165.des3: It is easier to think of the creation plane as a storage rather than a kind of output machine, where you can first apply items to be placed or dropped. Next, you must give the item a higher priority than other storage through priority (wrench icon) and then supply the item to the ME system for it to work.
ze.quest.166.title: ME inlet
ze.quest.166.subtitle: ME interface
ze.quest.166.des: This is a device for storing items output from an external machine in the ME storage system. You can store items, liquids, and gases. To be precise, it can be viewed as a connector connecting the ME storage system and an external pipe or belt. However, since it only functions as a connector, it cannot be removed directly from the box or machine.
ze.quest.167.title: ME input/output device
ze.quest.167.subtitle: ME inflow and outflow buses
ze.quest.167.des:
The ME inflow and outflow buses provide input and output to the ME system.
The ME intake bus takes items, liquids, gases, etc. from externally connected boxes or machines and stores them in the ME system.

The ME outflow bus, on the other hand, sets things to be taken out on the bus, and the registered elements in the ME system are stored in the connected box or machine.
ze.quest.168.title: A forest where the sun never sets
ze.quest.168.subtitle: twilight forest
ze.quest.168.des:
If you obtained a teleportation core with the help of an alien force or created it yourself, you will be able to head to another dimension.
