As shown in the example below, make a 2*2 floor with dirt and then place a border on top with 8 dirt. Then, all you have to do is plant some grass or grass on top and fill the hole with water. Now, if you throw the teleportation core into the water, a thunderstorm will occur and a portal to another world will open.
ze.quest.169.title: Proper Ammunition Storage
ze.quest.169.subtitle: ammunition box
ze.quest.169.des:
Storing ammo in an ammo box can effectively save inventory space. However, only one type of ammunition can be stored in one ammunition box. If you place it in the appropriate slot in your inventory or accessories tab, it will automatically replenish ammo when you reload your gun.

To add or remove ammo, hold the ammo box in your inventory and right-click on the ammo or an empty space.

You can store up to 3 sets of iron grade ammo boxes, 6 sets of gold grade ammo boxes, and 9 sets of diamond grade ammo boxes.
ze.quest.170.title: iron bar and spring
ze.quest.170.subtitle: gun workbench
ze.quest.170.des:
Most firearms can be crafted at this gun workshop.

It requires materials mainly made of steel and springs. Additionally, additional required materials are added depending on performance (function).
ze.quest.171.title: lead and gunpowder
ze.quest.171.subtitle: ammo workbench
ze.quest.171.des:
Most ammo can be crafted at the Ammunition Workbench.

Each ammunition requires different materials. It depends on the size of the warhead and the type of warhead.

You can craft this ammunition manually at an ammo workbench, but Create's ordered assembly allows you to mass-produce ammo more efficiently. (Excluding pellets, grenades, and rockets)
ze.quest.172.title: Maybe my belly button is bigger than my stomach
ze.quest.172.subtitle: attachment workbench
ze.quest.172.des: Most gun attachments can be crafted at this workbench.
ze.quest.173.title: A must-have for the MZ generation
ze.quest.173.subtitle: earplugs
ze.quest.173.des:
Blocking out virtually noisy or annoying sounds, these earplugs can block out any sound you want on your engineer's workbench.

You can dye it to make it look a little more fancy.

You can use it even more usefully by combining it with your helmet. Once the helmet is assembled again, it can be separated.

However, due to a bug in the mod itself, the earplugs do not block out some noise. We recommend using an extreme sound muffler. You can mute the desired sound by pressing the speaker icon in your inventory or the shortcut key (Number Pad/).
ze.quest.174.title: portable battery
ze.quest.174.subtitle: capacitor
ze.quest.174.des:
A storage battery (Create C.A.) can store electricity, but when it is recovered, the internal power is lost.

This capacitor can retain its internal power even when recovered. You can right-click with the Engineer's Hammer to determine the inputs and outputs of that face.

The tier determines the amount of power you can store.
ze.quest.175.title: geologist
ze.quest.175.subtitle: Mineral survey tools and core sampling drills
ze.quest.175.des:
There are tons of ore veins that you won't discover. To discover this vein, you will need a mineral survey tool.
Ore veins exist in one chunk (F3+G), and there may be chunks without any ore veins.

By right-clicking and holding the ore exploration tool on the ground, you can find the approximate location of ore veins in that chunk or nearby chunks.

Once you have roughly guessed the location of the vein, you can obtain accurate information about the vein by core sampling the chunk. If you charge the drill with power and right-click, the drill will take a cross section of the corresponding chunk. Once complete, you can right-click to obtain a sample to see what is in that vein. Information about veins can be found by searching for veins in the Engineer's Manual.

Now that you have found the vein, you can build a machine to mine minerals from the vein in the next quest.
ze.quest.176.title: infinite mining
ze.quest.176.subtitle: excavator
ze.quest.176.des:
If you install it on a chunk with an ore vein and supply power, the excavator will dig up part of the surrounding land and start mining the ore vein. The mined material is discharged into a port at the back of the machine.

You can obtain an infinite number of these minerals from the mineral veins here. Instead, it consumes a lot of power.

For manufacturing instructions, check the engineer's manual or search for excavator.
ze.quest.177.title: beginning of cerebral palsy
ze.quest.177.subtitle: extreme workbench
ze.quest.177.des:
With the transcendental engineering parts provided by the Galactic Federation, you can enter a technology that is more transcendent than theirs and, in a way, only you can achieve in the universe. However, if you consume transcendental engineering parts, you will no longer be able to escape the overworld with the support of the Galactic Federation.

Create an extreme workbench by compressing 81 workbenches and surrounding them with transcendental engineering parts, antimatter, and crystal matrix ingots made of nether stars and diamonds.

The extreme workbench supports a 9*9 size combination, and unfortunately, it does not function as a normal workbench.
ze.quest.178.title: Collect dust, dust, dust
ze.quest.178.subtitle: neutron collector
ze.quest.178.des:
Allows you to obtain neutron piles by collecting neutron particles floating in the air.

To properly use the neutron stack, you will need to install several of these machines.
ze.quest.179.title: Density concentration exceeds
ze.quest.179.subtitle: neutron compressor
ze.quest.179.des: Unlike regular material condensers, they compress one type of specific element and do not require a separate storage medium.
ze.quest.180.title: The power of the universe is in my hands
ze.quest.180.subtitle: infinity ingot
ze.quest.180.des:
You can craft an Infinity Ingot by combining a Neutron Ingot with an Infinity Catalyst and Crystal Matrix containing everything.

These ingots can be used to craft the best weapons, equipment, and armor.
ze.quest.181.title: Fill your selfish desires
ze.quest.181.subtitle: robot core
ze.quest.181.des:
You can create a robot core by processing infinity ingots, antimatter, and teleportation cores.

You can build a pretty robot based on this robot core.

By right-clicking the robot with your bare hand, you can give it a command to follow or wait. And check what command is given when you right-click with the item described below.

The oak button lets you choose whether to receive notifications about the robot's status.
The book can check the current status of the robot.
Books and quills can be used to check the robot's enchantment status.
Dye paints the robot in that color.

When robots kill enemies, they gain experience points and level up. It is enchanted accordingly and the robot becomes more powerful.
ze.quest.182.title: 81 inch monitor
ze.quest.182.subtitle: Extreme Combination Terminal
ze.quest.182.des: This is a terminal where you can use the extreme workbench in the AE system.
ze.quest.183.title: world geography
ze.quest.183.subtitle: nature's compass
ze.quest.183.des: This is a compass that shows the location of the desired biome.
ze.quest.184.title: hell
ze.quest.184.subtitle: nether
ze.quest.184.des:
The Nether, a world deep underground in this world (the Overworld), is a hellish world made of lava and stone that can burn forever.

The usual way to get there is to open an obsidian-lined portal, but if you don't have the resources, you can also use dimensional pull.

If you stay below the Y coordinate below -60, the dimensional force will slowly pull you in.
The way to return is the opposite: you can return by staying at the highest Y coordinate in the Nether.
ze.quest.185.title: road to the end
ze.quest.185.subtitle: eye of the end
ze.quest.185.des:
If you explore this world (overworld), you can find traces of a fairly developed civilization. Now, for some reason, most of it is devastated.

To find the cause, you must acquire eyes that will lead you to the source of the event.

You may be able to obtain the Eye from some high-level villager or powerful being. Or you can make it yourself. Otherwise, you can get it from a box by chance.
ze.quest.186.title: Ruins to the End
ze.quest.186.subtitle: base
ze.quest.186.des:
If you cast your eyes, your eyes will be guided by instinct and lead you to the source of the event. It is a secret place buried deep underground, so if you arrive half-baked, you may have to dig in the ground to sneak in.

Once you arrive, you must activate devices to move forward in a large maze-like base. However, I don't know what caused the contamination, but numerous monsters will block your path.
ze.quest.187.title: into the void
ze.quest.187.subtitle: end
ze.quest.187.des: After much exploration, you gathered all the eyes to insert into the portal and inserted them into the portal frame to open the portal. With everything ready, you jump into the portal and arrive at the End.
ze.quest.188.title: rally
ze.quest.188.subtitle: Community Center and Construction Tools
ze.quest.188.des:
You found it difficult to survive alone in this world. There are terrible monsters in the dark, big-nosed tribesmen who only ask for emeralds, and those who seem to understand anything are hostile to you.

In such an environment, you decide to establish a colony in the hope that there will be others like you.

Craft your own community center block, or right-click on the community center building in the abandoned community center building. If you have created a community center block, use the construction tool to determine the community's architectural style and use the community center block to name your colony to let the world know about you and rally the remaining survivors.

Descriptions of construction tools are on the next page.
ze.quest.188.des2:
While holding the blocks of the building you want to build, right-click the building tool on the ground to open the UI.

Then scroll down to Switch Pack and select the architectural style of your faction.
After selecting the style you want, select Fundamentals from the structure types at the bottom center and select Community Center. You can check in advance how the structure will be built at each stage by clicking the button on the left side of the UI.
Press ESC to close the UI for a moment and see how the structure will be built. If you have finished checking or need to make modifications, right-click the construction tool again, click the arrow keys on the right to adjust the structure, and confirm by pressing the green check icon at the bottom center.
ze.quest.188.des3: The village hall cannot be built right away. Check out this next quest.
ze.quest.189.title: skeleton
ze.quest.189.subtitle: Burning Skull Sword
ze.quest.189.des:
In the future, you will need the skulls of numerous Wither Skeletons to obtain many Nether Stars.

The Burning Skeleton Sword is a weapon that allows you to obtain Wither Skeleton Skulls even from regular skeletons thanks to its powerful cutting power and flame.
ze.quest.190.title: blacksmith of space
ze.quest.190.subtitle: Infinity Weapons and Tools
ze.quest.190.des:
Infinity Ingots allow you to craft the ultimate weapons and tools.

The cosmic sword can kill all the creatures it cuts down at once.
The Celestial Longbow has a faster firing speed than a regular bow, and when an arrow hits a block, it summons a rain of arrows in the air, dealing damage in a wide area.
World Destroyer can instantly destroy any block, including bedrock, and contains the fortune of the universe. Also, if you right-click while crouching, it will transform into a hammer form, and if you dig up blocks at this time, you will mine a wide range of blocks at once.
The Planet Devourer can immediately scoop up dirt-type blocks, and like the World Destroyer, right-click while crouching to transform into black hole mode and scoop up a wide range of dirt-type blocks at once.
Nature's Bane instantly destroys trees, and right-clicking while crouching destroys all surrounding plants.
The green earth hoe can cultivate a wide area at once by right-clicking on the soil, and can quickly grow crops or seedlings by right-clicking on them.

If you destroy a block with a tool that can destroy a wide range, such as a world destroyer or planet eater, the result of the destroyed block will be contained in an item in the form of a magnificent material, and when you right-click on it, all contents will appear.
ze.quest.191.title: Surround me with the universe
ze.quest.191.subtitle: infinity set
ze.quest.191.des:
With these armors on you don't have to be afraid of almost anything.

The Infinity Helmet keeps the wearer's hunger full and grants a night vision buff.
Infinity armor spreads wings, allowing the wearer to fly and preventing fall damage. It also blocks all debuffs.
Infinity leggings keep wearers from 'constantly' burning in fire.
Infinity Boots improve the wearer's jumping ability by 4 blocks and make their movement speed very fast. Additionally, blocks that are one space taller will automatically rise.

Additionally, when worn, it protects the wearer from radiation.
ze.quest.192.title: high dimensional box
ze.quest.192.subtitle: infinity box
ze.quest.192.des:
You can store a very large variety of items, and can store an almost infinite number of items (approximately 2 billion) in one slot, rather than just 64.

Even if it is destroyed, its contents are preserved.
ze.quest.193.title: manpower
ze.quest.193.subtitle: Gyrodyne
ze.quest.193.des:
There are several ways to fly. One is riding a gyrodyne.

This plane can fly using only your power (hunger) without any additional fuel. After riding, increase the speed with W. Once the speed increases to a certain level, you can adjust the altitude with the jump and crouch keys and move with WASD.

You can get off with Ctrl, and if the plane is damaged, you can repair it by right-clicking while crouching and consuming hunger.
ze.quest.194.title: fly in the sky
ze.quest.194.subtitle: Immersive Aircraft
ze.quest.194.des:
Have you ever used Gyrodyne? If you have tried it, you would be embarrassed to even call it an airplane because it consumes hunger and is slow. Fortunately, it is now possible to produce high-performance airplanes using engines using blaze burners.

For airships and quadrocopters, you can adjust altitude with the jump and crouch keys and move horizontally with WASD.
You can start the biplane with the jump key and increase the propeller speed. The crouch key does the opposite and turns the engine off. In a biplane with high speed, press S to ascend and W to descend. AD turns left and right.

To get off each plane, press Ctrl, and to repair, crouch and right-click to consume hunger. Additionally, it can be modified by installing additional parts, and in the case of an airship, it can be combined to create a cargo airship or warship.
ze.quest.195.title: prepare and eat
ze.quest.195.subtitle: Farmer's Delight
ze.quest.195.des:
First of all, I'll have to explain why you need to prepare food. Otherwise, I'd just eat carrots with gold lacquer because it's a hassle.
If there was only a hunger and satiety system, that would have been the answer, but the story is different here.

First of all, each food has nutrients. When you tap your diet (hunger icon) in your inventory, you will see each nutrient consumed. If you fill it above a certain level, you will receive several good buffs. Eating only vegetables wouldn’t be good, right? Also, if you die, these nutrients are reset, so there is a reason not to die. (However, if the sugar level is too high, you will suffer from constant hunger)

Second, if you experience different types of food, your maximum stamina increases. Through the book you will receive as a reward, you can see what foods you have tried and what you have not. This does not reset when you die. But it will be an opportunity to cook various foods, right?

Cooking equipment will be explained on the next page.
ze.quest.195.des2:
A stove can cook food like a campfire and provides a good source of heat for cooking pots or pans above.

The cooking pot can be installed on the stove to cook various foods by boiling them with water.

You can cook the frying pan in front of the stove by holding it in your main hand and right-clicking while holding the food you want to cook in the other hand. You can also install and use it by right-clicking while crouching. Or you can wield it against people you don't like. (Unfortunately, it does not stop bullets)

A cutting board is used along with a kitchen knife to prepare or cut food. Also... you can do other things with a cutting board. For example, lifting a tree and peeling its bark with an axe...
ze.quest.196.title: Check the quest
ze.quest.196.subtitle: PDA
ze.quest.196.des:
With the PDA in your hand, you can see how to survive in the future. It also tells you what you can do based on your skill level.

Even if you don't have a PDA, you can view this screen by pressing L.
ze.quest.197.title: get out of the courtyard
ze.quest.197.subtitle: forest courtyard
ze.quest.197.des:
Using the blank magic map you received as a reward from a previous quest, you can discover the terrain of this forest world, its powerful monsters, and their locations.

Most places use magic to keep visitors out, so it's important to find the only forest courtyard that doesn't have defensive magic.

There, a monster guarding the courtyard awaits you.
ze.quest.198.title: how do i get out
ze.quest.198.subtitle: get out
ze.quest.198.des:
The naga, which takes the form of a giant snake, circles around you and lunges at you. If it charges at you and blocks the attack with a shield, it will be stunned and give you a moment to attack. When the Naga's health is low, the Naga's tail gets shorter.

Once you obtain the Naga Scale, you will be able to pierce the magical veil of the nearby Lich's Castle.

Also, if you right-click on the box created when a Naga dies with the magic map, the map will show that the Naga in that area has been killed. Other bosses can also be displayed in the same way.
ze.quest.199.title: magic castle
ze.quest.199.subtitle: Lich's Castle
ze.quest.199.des:
The Naga's Scale can pierce the magical veil of the Lich's castle. The entrance is blocked, so you have to break through the wall with a pickaxe to enter.

As expected from the castle owner, there will be undead monsters and magical creatures to stop you in the castle. Survive the attacks and reach the top of the castle.
ze.quest.200.title: Buddhahood (forced)
ze.quest.200.subtitle: rich
ze.quest.200.des:
You can have an audience with the lich at the top of the castle. It's an audience, but since you're an intruder, they'll attack you as soon as they see you.

The lich will attack you using various magic, and he will block your attacks with a magic shield.

To break through the Lich's shield, you must block the magic thrown by his clone and hit the Lich. If you do so, the shield will take damage and gradually break down.

Defeating the Lich will lift the curses he has placed on various biomes.
ze.quest.201.title: A haven for knights
ze.quest.201.subtitle: dark forest ruins
ze.quest.201.des:
The curse that existed in the Dark Forest has been lifted, making it possible to reach the Dark Forest Ruins. The ruins are underground, so you need to find the entrance and open it.

To open the entrance, place any trophy on the trophy stand near the entrance to prove you are worthy of entering the Knights' Haven.

The sanctuary is shaped like a maze. Find your way through the maze map you will receive as a reward. This maze has organically intertwined levels and may require a lot of guidance. It may not be enough, so please save it. And the goblins who guard the knights' rest will stop you.

In the room beyond the door, double barred with iron bars and bordered with obsidian, you will be able to awaken the eternal sleep of the knights of the gods of the past.
ze.quest.202.title: knight of god
ze.quest.202.subtitle: Ghost Knight(s)
ze.quest.202.des:
Once they reach their resting place, they will ward off intruders. Maybe he's trying to test you.

They are six in number, usually just floating around with armor and weapons, but they will take shape when it is time to attack you.

Kill them and they will acknowledge you, and the Carminite devices of the Dark Tower will follow your commands.
ze.quest.203.title: Carminite Top
ze.quest.203.subtitle: tower of darkness
ze.quest.203.des:
After being recognized by the knights, you are eligible to enter the Tower of Darkness. You must climb the tower by activating the tower's Carminite devices and slay the golems and ghasts that stand in your way (usually you climb by stacking blocks, etc. out of annoyance).

The first Ghast will be waiting for you at the top of the tower.
ze.quest.204.title: the first ghast
ze.quest.204.subtitle: Your Gast
ze.quest.204.des:
Your Ghast, befitting its title as the first Ghast, is very large and has a very cumbersome strategy.

If you are in a confrontation with Your Ghast, lightning will strike randomly in the four rooms connected to the top floor and Ghast fluids will be summoned there. Dealing with the ghast fluids there will recharge the ghast trap in the center of the room, and when you give a redstone signal to the charged trap, the trap will trigger and pull your ghast there, drawing your ghast within range of a melee attack (your ghast must be nearby at this time, and if it is casting a specific attack, it will be ignored). That's the right time to attack.

Be careful because Your Ghast sheds tears when its health is low, quickly depleting the durability of the hit person's head armor.

If you kill Your Ghast, you can obtain Flamestone Tears, which are Your Ghast's burning tears.
ze.quest.205.title: A typical maze dungeon
ze.quest.205.subtitle: labyrinth
ze.quest.205.des:
The poisonous mosquitoes in the swamp have become extinct, allowing you to reach the labyrinth in the swamp. There is a labyrinth at the bottom of the hill, and in this labyrinth, you will be greeted by various insect-type monsters and minotaurs. To avoid getting lost in the maze-shaped labyrinth, we recommend drawing your way using the maze map you will receive as a reward. If you don't have enough maps, you can also craft them.

The labyrinth consists of a total of two floors, and in order to go down to the next floor, you must find a room with an iron grate blocking the passage connected to the lower level. When you get to the next floor, you'll need a new maze map.

As you explore, you will reach Minoshrum's room, which is blocked off by an oak fence.
ze.quest.206.title: Umamusco
ze.quest.206.subtitle: minosh room
ze.quest.206.des: Minoshrum has low intelligence and only performs lunge attacks, so there are many opportunities to attack. Defeating him and consuming the Minotaur Stroganoff will allow you to withstand the scorching heat of the swamp's core.
ze.quest.207.title: Swamp Predator
ze.quest.207.subtitle: hydra nest
ze.quest.207.des: In the center of the swamp, with its back to a large hill, there is a dragon, Hydra, that hunts the surrounding animals.
ze.quest.208.title: If one head is cut off, two more heads will rise.
ze.quest.208.subtitle: Hydra
ze.quest.208.des:
A three-headed dragon, the Hydra fires hot breath from its mouth, setting creatures on fire. There are also times when it throws fireballs or bites you directly with its huge mouth.

The only way to effectively damage a Hydra is to hit it in the head with a fireball. Black smoke will appear around the head where the fireball will be fired, so be prepared to catch it and swat the fireball away.

Hydra mostly uses fire attacks, so if you prepare fire resistance potions, you can defeat them relatively safely.

By defeating the Hydra, you can obtain Fiery Blood, the fiery blood of the Hydra. You can also obtain good food by obtaining hydra meat.
ze.quest.209.title: Alpha Yeti exits a cave in a snowy forest
ze.quest.209.subtitle: yeti cave
ze.quest.209.des:
Some of the coldness of the snow-covered forest has been reduced, making it possible to enter the Yeti Cave.

Yetis live beneath the square hill. At least they won't welcome you.
ze.quest.210.title: alpha yeti
ze.quest.210.subtitle: Boss Yeti
ze.quest.210.des:
The leader Yeti, the largest of the Yetis, will attack you to protect them from outside creatures.

The Yeti can drop ice icicles from the ceiling, throw ice bombs, and pick you up and throw them directly at you.

The leader Yeti will attack with all his might, and if you wait too long, he may get tired and sit down. That's your opportunity. This description may make them easy to deal with, but the Yeti will not want their leader to be harmed.

The Yeti Fur obtained from defeating the Boss Yeti allows you to withstand the cold of the Twilight Glacier at the center of the snowy forest and gain an audience with the Snow Queen in the Aurora Palace.
ze.quest.211.title: Let It Go
ze.quest.211.subtitle: Aurora Palace
ze.quest.211.des:
If you climb the Twilight Glacier, a high ice area in the middle of a snow-covered forest, you can find cute penguins and the Aurora Palace located in the center of the glacier.

The Snow Queen is on the top floor of Aurora Palace, and her descendants below will stop you. Jump across the slippery ice to reach the top floor. If there is a ceiling blocked by ice, it is a sign that the Snow Queen is above it.
ze.quest.212.title: Never Gonna Give You Up
ze.quest.212.subtitle: snow queen
ze.quest.212.des:
You finally reach the top floor of the palace and are granted an audience with the Snow Queen. ...just as hostile to you as the lich.

She flies on ice and blocks your attacks. This is often the case when she lands on the ground with a slam attack.
ze.quest.213.title: deep in a cave
ze.quest.213.subtitle: troll cave
ze.quest.213.des:
Defeating the Hydra, Your Ghast, and the Snow Queen will stop the acid rain on the plateau, allowing you to enter. However, the center is no longer accessible due to thorny vines, so you will have to work around the plateau.

There is a cave on the plateau or deep underground under a large cloud, there is a troll cave. There is a giant obsidian in the center, and a pile of regular obsidian on the outside.

Giant obsidian cannot be mined with current equipment, so dig up a pile of regular obsidian and obtain a magic bean from the box in the center. Trolls don't seem to particularly like you.
ze.quest.214.title: steve and the beanstalk
ze.quest.214.subtitle: magic beans
ze.quest.214.des:
Magic beans appear to be a special crop. Seeing how the trolls keep it so precious. To check this, we need to go back to the ground.

Head under the giant cloud with your magic bean and you'll see the quality dirt sparkling. If you plant a bean there, there will be a loud vibration and the magic bean will grow quickly and massively, up to a gigantic cloud.

If you think about fairy tales, you can see that there are good treasures in them. Go up.
ze.quest.215.title: Steve's Travels
ze.quest.215.subtitle: cabin above the clouds
ze.quest.215.des: Above the clouds you can see a huge cabin and a tree. And the two giants. According to the fairy tale, we know that those giants must be slain.
ze.quest.216.title: A really big pickaxe on a decent block.
ze.quest.216.subtitle: giant
ze.quest.216.des:
The two giants don't seem to be pleased with your intrusion. If you think about it, there are very few people who welcome you warmly.

Anyway, if you kill the two giants, you can get the Giant's Pickaxe from the Miner Giant. Although it is a stone pickaxe, I have no doubt that it can mine giant obsidian.
ze.quest.217.title: where is genie
ze.quest.217.subtitle: ashes lamp
ze.quest.217.des:
If you dig up the giant obsidian in the troll cave with a giant's pickaxe, you can get an Ash Lamp from the box in the center.

The Ash Lamp instantly burns the thorny vines around you and reduces them to ashes when you press and hold the right mouse button in the air.

This means that the road to the final destination has finally been opened.
ze.quest.218.title: Half-Forest 3
ze.quest.218.subtitle: last castle
ze.quest.218.des: You will reach the center of the plateau by burning thorn vines and arrive at the final castle. When you reach the center...
ze.quest.219.title: Totem of Immortality (Mass-Produced)
ze.quest.219.subtitle: talisman of life
ze.quest.219.des:
It can be found in chests in some dungeons in the Twilight Forest. When held in the inventory, like an immortal totem, it is consumed when the holder dies, giving them a chance to survive.

You can create a level 2 talisman by combining four level 1 amulets. When used, the level 2 talisman grants the bearer various survival-helping buffs.
ze.quest.220.title: /gamerule keepInventory true
ze.quest.220.subtitle: Talisman of Preservation
ze.quest.220.des:
It can be found in chests or maze slimes in some dungeons in the Twilight Forest. If you die and respawn while having it in your inventory, some of the items you possess will be preserved depending on the level of the amulet.

The first level amulet preserves the items in your hand and the armor items you are wearing, the second level preserves all hotbar slots, and the third level preserves all inventory.
ze.quest.221.title: colorful
ze.quest.221.subtitle: Ms. Quest
ze.quest.221.des:
If you visit Miss Quest, who lives in a temple in the enchanted forest, and give her wool of all colors, she will reward you.

Some colors of wool can be obtained from dispensers hidden in temples.
ze.quest.222.title: first hire
ze.quest.222.subtitle: architecture office
ze.quest.222.des:
To construct buildings in your colony, you must hire an architect. To hire an architect, you need an architect's office.

You can build a building office block using the same construction tools as a village hall (you must place it so that it does not overlap with the village hall building).

Once an architectural office block has been placed, you can right-click on the office block to open the UI and click Manage Workers to hire citizens gathered around it. The abilities required for an architect are colored.

Once you've hired it, go back and click on the building settings, confirm the materials you need, and then click build the building, and the hired architect will check and complete the job.

You can check the required materials by asking the architect directly or by clicking the required resources tab on the left side of the architecture office block. You can also check them remotely through the resource scroll you will receive as a reward. Materials can be placed in the Architect's Inventory or in the Architectural Office's Block Stash.

Please read the next page while waiting for construction to be completed.
ze.quest.222.des2:
Depending on the level of the facility, the level of tools available to workers there will vary. In the beginning, you can only use wood and gold tools, but as you upgrade, you can use iron, diamond, netherite, and even enchanted tools.

Citizens, including workers, must sleep in the evening and do not work if it rains. Also, when a citizen dies in the colony, no work is done to allow for a one-day mourning period.

Citizens, like you, are constantly hungry and need a constant supply of food. Additionally, you may contract a disease or die from attacks from nearby monsters. For now you'll have to take care of this yourself, but in the future you can continue to stabilize your colony by building the buildings you need and hiring workers.

If there is an icon above a citizen, it means they have something to say to you. To be a good leader, you must be able to solve the needs of your citizens.
ze.quest.223.title: recruiting outsiders
ze.quest.223.subtitle: hotel
ze.quest.223.des:
First of all, you can't make citizens homeless, so you have to build inns to provide them with temporary lodging.

The inn has a total of 4 beds, so it can sleep all the citizens recruited at the beginning. Now, when all citizens are in bed, a notification will appear in chat. If the player spends the night trying to sleep before then, complaints from citizens who can't sleep in bed will increase.

You can only build one per colony, but it also serves to recruit outsiders with good abilities.

To recruit an outsider, you must have a spare residence and provide them with the items they ask for.

When an outsider dies within the colony, the colony's reputation for safety suffers, prolonging the cycle of outsider arrivals.
ze.quest.224.title: You, apply for graduate school.
ze.quest.224.subtitle: university
ze.quest.224.des:
University research is essential to improve the overall abilities of colony residents or to build more advanced structures.

You can hire a researcher to conduct the research you want, and you must meet the research conditions.
ze.quest.225.title: Buy your own home
ze.quest.225.subtitle: residence
ze.quest.225.des:
The citizens are not satisfied with the inn's beds, so eventually you have to build a house.

The first phase of the building can accommodate only one person, but the capacity can be increased through upgrades.

A man and a woman live in one living space (including an inn) and have children if there is one remaining. You can decide whether to allow this in your Community Center block settings (normally it is set to Allow).
ze.quest.226.title: Our local special forces
ze.quest.226.subtitle: guard tower
ze.quest.226.des:
Once the colony reaches a certain size, it becomes a target for nearby enemy forces. Citizens are sometimes afraid of this and ask you to build a guard tower.

Hired guards patrol the surrounding buildings. They are mainly active at night and sleep during the day. Since they live in guard towers, they do not need separate housing facilities.
ze.quest.227.title: cafeteria
ze.quest.227.subtitle: restaurant
ze.quest.227.des:
If you find it difficult to provide food to your citizens every day, try building a restaurant. If a restaurant has food, citizens will go there first.

Waiters can serve food to citizens and do basic cooking (baking). Build a chef's kitchen to serve more complex dishes.

Decide what food to serve in your restaurant and supply the ingredients.
ze.quest.228.title: Sing it again! I'm a stupid sandwich!
ze.quest.228.subtitle: chef's kitchen
ze.quest.228.des:
To provide quality food to your citizens, you'll need to hire cooks in the Chef's Kitchen.

A chef can cook many different dishes, even ones you can't cook.
ze.quest.229.title: catch the passage of time
ze.quest.229.subtitle: fishing
ze.quest.229.des:
Hired fishermen carry the provided fishing rod and fish in a 7*7 area of ​​water nearby (this may vary depending on the architectural style, but usually when constructing a fishing spot, a space for fishing is built as a bonus).

You mainly catch fish, but you can also catch treasure.
ze.quest.230.title: Coupang Logistics Warehouse
ze.quest.230.subtitle: Warehouses and delivery businesses
ze.quest.230.des:
It serves to store a large amount of items from each facility within the colony. You can build additional delivery businesses and hire delivery workers through the delivery business block inside.

Delivery men carry goods from each facility. You can also add items requested by workers in your facility, or minimum stock items in each facility block so that the courier does not pick them up or fills in any shortages.
ze.quest.231.title: villager automatic farming
ze.quest.231.subtitle: farm
ze.quest.231.des:
Hire farmers to help you grow and harvest different crops.

If you set up a field (scarecrow) to designate an area to grow crops, the farmer will farm there (this may vary depending on the architectural style, but usually when building a farm, space for farming is built as a bonus).
ze.quest.232.title: If you don't have bread... you'll have to starve.
ze.quest.232.subtitle: bakery
ze.quest.232.des: This is a place where hired bakers do the baking, mainly making bread, cookies, and pies.
ze.quest.233.title: forest destroyer
ze.quest.233.subtitle: lumberyard
ze.quest.233.des:
You can provide the lumberjack with an ax and hoe and cut down trees around you or in a designated area.

Additionally, some wood-related processing can be performed. For example, you could ask them to peel the bark off a tree.

You can also hire an orchardist to harvest the fruit from your trees.
ze.quest.234.title: into the depths
ze.quest.234.subtitle: mine
ze.quest.234.des:
A mine is a facility where you can obtain underground resources by hiring miners and providing them with pickaxes and other materials.

Because it is digging into the ground, there are more factors that need to be taken care of than with bare facilities. You will build a platform for miners to climb up and down the ground and mine, and install torches, but once a cave or dungeon is discovered, monsters will target miners, so you must also designate guards.
ze.quest.235.title: Player Interference
ze.quest.235.subtitle: Shipping and receiving items
ze.quest.235.des:
If your colony has a warehouse and a delivery man is hired, there are blocks you can use.

When you put an item in a delivery box, the delivery person moves the item in the delivery box to the warehouse and uses it as a resource within the colony.

In the case of a product receiving box, you can set the desired item and the delivery person will transport the selected item from the warehouse to the receiving box.

Through these, items can be supplied to automated facilities already created by the player, and conversely, the player can automatically receive the colony's surplus resources.
ze.quest.236.title: Respawn Location
ze.quest.236.subtitle: hospital
ze.quest.236.des:
It is cumbersome to visit and take care of citizens every time they get sick. To solve this, you need to research hospitals at university (research energy in the Citizen tab).

Build hospitals and hire doctors so that your citizens can go to the doctor for treatment when they are sick. As a side note, even if there is no doctor, citizens can rest at the hospital when they are sick.
ze.quest.237.title: cyberpunk 1201
ze.quest.237.subtitle: CyberWare
ze.quest.237.des:
Sometimes you may have seen monsters with parts of their bodies replaced by machines. These are monsters with the modifier cyber. Either someone captured them and modified them, or the original modified person became a zombie... In any case, there was an opportunity to extract their mechanical parts (cyberware) and use them.

be careful. They are dangerous beings with many abilities different from regular monsters. If you let your guard down, you will be turned into a piece of meat in an instant.

Cyberware Workbench has a low chance of disassembling harvested cyberware and drawing blueprints on paper. Obtaining parts varies depending on the type of cyberware, and the probability of obtaining blueprints is as low as 15%%.
ze.quest.238.title: Look carefully
ze.quest.238.subtitle: scanner
ze.quest.238.des:
Obtaining blueprints from the Cyberware Workbench requires low odds.

Scanners have a high chance of obtaining blueprints for the cyberware. However, scanning takes a long time.

The cyber eye used as a material can be used regardless of whether it is extracted or manufactured.

The cyberware used in the scanner will be destroyed unconditionally, and there is a 50%% chance that it will be destroyed without even obtaining a blueprint.
ze.quest.239.title: Cyber ​​storage (nothing special)
ze.quest.239.subtitle: Blueprint storage and parts boxes
ze.quest.239.des:
If you place the Blueprint Storage and Parts Box next to a Cyberware Workbench, you can use the contents directly from the Cyberware Workbench.

The parts box can be carried around and must be crouched and right-clicked to place it.
ze.quest.240.title: katana runner
ze.quest.240.subtitle: katana
ze.quest.240.des:
We have discovered a more efficient way to extract cyberware from cyber monsters.

You can equip an iron sword with parts to turn it into a katana, and when you kill cyber monsters with a katana, you have a higher chance of getting cyberware. This is an enchantment that can be done on a basic sword.
ze.quest.241.title: Good doctor! What do you mean!
ze.quest.241.subtitle: Mechanized surgical equipment and surgical equipment
ze.quest.241.des:
Surgical and mechanized surgical equipment are required to equip harvested or crafted cyberware.

You install a mechanized surgical machine on top of the surgical machine, decide which part of the machine to install or remove cyberware from, enter the operating machine, close the door, and the surgery begins. At this time, some of your stamina will be used up, so if you don't want to die, recover your stamina in advance and proceed with the surgery.

Although extracted cyberware can be transplanted as is, it is advisable to use home-made cyberware if possible due to reasons such as lower power efficiency or poor performance compared to manufactured cyberware.
ze.quest.241.des2:
Some cyberware must be installed by removing and replacing the original part. The caution here is that if you just remove a healthy part and do not choose a replacement, problems will arise. For example, if your heart or brain is removed, you will die immediately after the surgery. Having your stomach removed makes you unable to eat, and having no arms or legs limits your ability to destroy and use items, blocks, or makes basic movement impossible. Fortunately, this is notified in advance by a notification or warning on the mechanized surgical unit.

When equipped with cyberware, essence will be deducted. This is indicated by the left bar on the mechanized surgical unit. There is no problem if the blue gauge is deducted, but if the red part begins to be deducted, the body will not be able to accept the cyberware. In this case, symptoms can be temporarily alleviated by using a drug called neuroherpes.

Some cyberware requires power. In this case, you must install cyberware with a power generation function or install battery cyberware and charge the power.
ze.quest.242.title: Cyborg exclusive charger
ze.quest.242.subtitle: charger
ze.quest.242.des: When you stand on it, it synchronizes with the charger and recharges the equipped Cyberware Battery. By right-clicking, you can also drain the power from the battery to the charger.
ze.quest.243.title: Proof that Steve has a warm heart
ze.quest.243.subtitle: creative storage battery
ze.quest.243.des: The robot core will allow you to create cyberware that produces infinite power.
ze.quest.244.title: internet broadcasting
ze.quest.244.subtitle: radio kit
ze.quest.244.des: Once installed, it will attract cyber monsters near block 64, making it easier to collect cyberware.
ze.quest.245.title: brown belt
ze.quest.245.subtitle: tool belt
ze.quest.245.des:
You can wear it in the waist slot and hold F to store or take out your tools.

To increase capacity, work on the anvil with the belt pouch to increase capacity.
ze.quest.246.title: spinning round and round
ze.quest.246.subtitle: millstone
ze.quest.246.des:
This machine can be operated by connecting power to its teeth or to the shaft at the bottom.

It mainly serves to grind general items. If you want to grind some types of stone, you'll need something bigger.
ze.quest.247.title: One of the causes of the Ludwig movement
ze.quest.247.subtitle: mechanical arm
ze.quest.247.des:
Before installing, you must crouch and right-click to specify the input and output sections.

Once you designate and install them and power them up, the mechanical arm will pick up items from the input section and place them on the output section.

Since you cannot directly insert or remove items from boxes, etc., you must use an item holder, funnel, belt, etc.
ze.quest.248.title: It's speed, not speed.
ze.quest.248.subtitle: rotation speed controller
ze.quest.248.des:
If you are tired of adjusting speed by complicatedly connecting large and small gears, I recommend this machine. After giving rotational force to the axis and attaching a large gear wheel on top, you can adjust the desired speed by right-clicking and holding the numbered area.

However, speed remains inversely proportional to fatigue. If you want ultra-fast speeds, you need to produce plenty of fatigue.
ze.quest.249.title: dragon slayer
ze.quest.249.subtitle: ender dragon
ze.quest.249.des:
When you arrive at the center of End, also known as the Void World, you find a building in the center of the island. As you get closer, an alien force activates the surrounding towers and eventually summons a dragon.

The dragon will do everything in its power to drive you out of the End. The dragon recovers its power through the end crystals in the surrounding towers, so if you want to defeat it, you must first destroy the end crystals in the surrounding towers.
ze.quest.250.title: Guardian's Citadel
ze.quest.250.subtitle: ruined castle
ze.quest.250.des:
Once you defeat the dragon, you will be able to leave the central island. A portal that allows you to teleport to a distant location will be created in the air at the end of the central island.

To find another powerful enemy, you can gather resources from the End and craft the Eye of the Void to guide you.

Follow the eyes and you will reach a ruined fortress. Or, you can try looking for it yourself.
ze.quest.251.title: Shoulder brother
ze.quest.251.subtitle: Ender Golem
ze.quest.251.des:
This golem guarding the castle will sense you as an intruder and attack.

It's not that difficult to kill, but it serves as proof that the fortress is owned by someone else.
ze.quest.252.title: the face behind the mask
ze.quest.252.subtitle: Ender Guardian
ze.quest.252.des:
There is an Ender Guardian on the lowest level of the castle. Due to its large size and high defense, physical attacks are almost ineffective, and its ability to link attacks that ignore your defense makes it a difficult enemy.

Instead, you will still receive damage from magic, so you must use it. For example, the Void Core obtained from the Ender Golem.
ze.quest.253.title: burning speculation
ze.quest.253.subtitle: burning arena
ze.quest.253.des:
You can find it using the Eye of Fire or by exploring on your own to find the Burning Arena, a massive amphitheater structure.

As the name suggests, it's full of blazes and lava. You must overcome this and go up to the upper floor.
ze.quest.254.title: Guard down
ze.quest.254.subtitle: Ignited Revenant
ze.quest.254.des:
After climbing a certain distance into the arena, an Ignited Reverent will attack you.

He protects himself with the shields he wears around his body, so he must attack to avoid the shields or strike a critical blow with an axe (Minecraft only) to shatter the shields.
ze.quest.255.title: Give birth to new life from ashes
ze.quest.255.subtitle: Ignis
ze.quest.255.des:
If you offer the Burning Ashes obtained from Reverent to the Upper Fire Altar, Ignis, also known as the Embodiment of Flame, will answer your call. be careful. Ignis will be much more powerful than any enemy you've encountered so far.

He can stun you by blocking your attacks with his giant shield, Bulwark of Flame, and he wields his giant sword, the Incinerator, to burn you with merciless attacks. Additionally, when the target attacked by Ignis receives damage, Ignis recovers health and the target falls under a curse that is proportional to maximum health and almost ignores defense.

In order to deliver an effective hit to Ignis, the timing is when he lowers his shield for an attack. In addition, you can also inflict damage that ignores the shield with magic attacks. Alternatively, you can destroy his shield by deflecting his Abyssal Fireball (purple projectile) and hitting it.

Ignis may destroy part of the arena floor, causing you to fall into the lava below, so make sure to prepare fire resistance potions, etc.
ze.quest.256.title: ancient forge
ze.quest.256.subtitle: Forge of Soul
ze.quest.256.des:
You can find the Soul Forge by wandering around the Nether or crafting a Monster's Eye.

It appears that ancient fragments were forged and used here in the past. Otherwise there wouldn't be many ancient remains here.
ze.quest.257.title: ancient war weapon
ze.quest.257.subtitle: netherite monster
ze.quest.257.des:
The netherite monster that keeps its position deep within the forge will attack you when it sees you near it.

True to its nickname as an ancient war weapon, it will launch a wide range of attacks based on its gigantic body made entirely of netherite. It also attacks by pouring lava, so you need to have a fire resistance potion.

This giant monster's weak point is its head, so we recommend attacking it directly or using long-distance attacks with arrows or firearms.
ze.quest.258.title: Ancient.. pet monster
ze.quest.258.subtitle: netherite mini straw city
ze.quest.258.des:
The Netherite Ministrocity, which can be found hidden in the forge, can be activated by attaching a lava cell obtained from defeating a Netherite monster. If you can't find the hidden place, you can craft a Netherite Statue and right-click to summon it.

There is no need to fight this little guy, as it considers the person it attaches the battery to as its owner.

Due to its small size, it has no combat functions, but it has a 5*3 storage box. You can heal it by feeding it coal, and you can carry it around in a bucket. You can also right-click while crouching to have it follow you, move as you want, or wait.

When a Netherite Ministro City dies, it is guaranteed to drop a Netherite Statue. You can install this to revive it, but you will need to reattach the lava cell.
ze.quest.259.title: How to Train Your Dragon (WIP)
ze.quest.259.subtitle: dragon egg
ze.quest.259.des:
When you kill a dragon, a dragon egg will spawn in the central building. If you touch it, it will teleport to a random location nearby.

Because it is affected by gravity, it will fall down if there is no block below it. You can use this to install a torch below to obtain an item.

Not now, but wouldn't we be able to see a dragon hatched from this egg in the future?
ze.quest.260.title: For latecomers
ze.quest.260.subtitle: end fix
ze.quest.260.des:
The advance party may have already slain the end dragon. But if that's the case, latecomers won't be able to clear the quest.

Craft four end crystals and place them on the four bedrocks of the central building to summon the dragon again.
ze.quest.261.title: knight's shame
ze.quest.261.subtitle: knight of steel
ze.quest.261.des:
Found in the base's End Portal room or in the Iron Knight's room, this gigantic Iron Knight acts solely to protect his mission.

If you get close, the knight will wake up and try to eliminate you by swinging his huge axe, the Thousand Axe. His steel armor blocks all attacks. However, it is not completely invincible. The only weak spot is where the sword is in his back. But the driver knows this too, so he won't give you a chance easily.

Wait for him to bring the ax down. There will be an opening to pull out the heavy ax again.
ze.quest.262.title: made of stone
ze.quest.262.subtitle: room of the iron knight
ze.quest.262.des: This room, rarely found underground in the overworld, is guarded alone by the Iron Knight.
ze.quest.263.title: nest
ze.quest.263.subtitle: Umbutana Village
ze.quest.263.des:
The Umbutana village, found in the Sanava biome, is a tribal village centered around its chieftain, Umbuti, the Sunbird.

Under normal circumstances, they will recognize you as an enemy and the tribesmen, the Umbutana, will come and attack you, and the chieftain, Umbuti, the sun ancestor, will sit on his throne and burn you with the power of the sun.

If you are lucky enough to obtain a mask and wear one of them, they will recognize you as an ally and not attack first. However, if you attack them, destroy their village, or take off their mask, they will attack you mercilessly.

When they are friendly to you, you can offer gold to Umbuti, the Sun Bird, and receive the blessing of the Sun, which allows you to wield the power of the Sun for a long time. When you right-click on a desired location with your bare hands while blessed with the sun, you can use Sunstrike, which sends down sunlight in the sky and burns the target. If you right-click while crouching, you can use Solar Beam, which fires a powerful beam after gathering energy.
ze.quest.264.title: firebird
ze.quest.264.subtitle: Umbuti, sun bird
ze.quest.264.des:
If you want to kill Umbuti or Sunbird, we recommend that you prepare well. He will continue to sit on his throne and continue to summon the Umbutanas to swarm you and burn you with the power of the sun.

When health drops below 75, Umbuta or Storks are summoned. Umbutana Stork is by his side, infusing him with life force, and in this state, Umbuti, the Sun Bird, becomes invincible. For this reason, it is best to kill Umbutana Stork immediately if it appears.
ze.quest.265.title: frost monster
ze.quest.265.subtitle: Frost hat
ze.quest.265.des:
Found in the Snowy Plains or Icicle biomes, these large beasts are usually sleeping. If you get close, it will put the glacier crystal in its hand into its mouth and begin to roar and attack you.

It has powerful attack power and stamina commensurate with its large size, and freezes the target through glacier crystals.

There are some strategies. You can use an invisibility potion on its back to become invisible, then go near the sleeping Frostmaw and snatch the Glacier Crystal from its hand. Of course, Frostmaw will immediately realize that the Glacier Crystal has been stolen and immediately search for a suspect. You'd better be careful. Even though he lost his ability to freeze, he still has a large physique.
ze.quest.266.title: to gain enlightenment
ze.quest.266.subtitle: Sculptor's Monastery
ze.quest.266.des:
This monastery, which can be found mainly in mountainous terrain, was once home to monks who studied the magic of the earth or perception. But now, only spirit monsters called Bluffs are guarding the place.

Only the sculptor Tongbi, the last monk left in the center of the monastery.
ze.quest.267.title: Bluffing
ze.quest.267.subtitle: bluff
ze.quest.267.des:
Set in the Sculptor's Monastery, these spirits will attack you using perception magic.

After defeating them, you can use the Bluff's Stick to undergo trials from the last monk, Sculptor Tongbi.
ze.quest.268.title: Fable Deungseon
ze.quest.268.subtitle: Gauntlets of Perception
ze.quest.268.des:
You can receive the trial by talking to Sculptor Tongbi, located in the center of Sculptor's Sodowon, and handing him the Stick of Bluff. The ordeal is to face Tongbi, who climbed to a high place by stepping on the perceptions created by the power of perception.

Cheating is not permitted in this ordeal. If you are caught flying or placing or destroying blocks, you will fail the trial. Of course, you can try again by handing over the bluff stick. However, it seems like they are flexible enough to allow you to drink jump-enhancing potions. This may be because it is an almost impossible ordeal without it in the first place.

After completing the trial, Tongbi transfers the power of the Perceptionist to you by carving and handing you the Gauntlets of Perception, a tool that helps you use the power of perception. And he...
ze.quest.269.title: Destroyer
ze.quest.269.subtitle: Sculptor Tongbi
ze.quest.269.des:
If you don't want to undergo the trials of Sculptor Tongfei, but want to use the power of perception, you can kill him. Well, I don't recommend it.

When you defeat him, he will drop a random piece from the Perceptionist's set. But these are things you can get from the Sculptor's Monastery. So, if possible, this is not a recommended route. The fact that he has survived for so long means that he is strong.
ze.quest.270.title: Perception Master
ze.quest.270.subtitle: Perceptionist Set
ze.quest.270.des: These equipment, which can be obtained from the Sculptor's Monastery, are imbued with the power of sentient magicians. Or... kill the last remaining monk.
ze.quest.271.title: Lost Technology
ze.quest.271.subtitle: ancient factory
ze.quest.271.des:
Located deep underground in the Overworld, this factory is difficult to find and can usually be found by crafting Machine Eyes. To manufacture the eyes, Create's mechanical process is required. If you're lucky, you can find it.

Once inside, the machines guarding the factory will attack you. A Nether Star is needed to awaken the powerful beings here.
ze.quest.272.title: Cyber ​​Wither
ze.quest.272.subtitle: Harbinger
ze.quest.272.des:
Harbinger, which has been implanted with a Nether star, begins to explode surrounding blocks and annihilate all living things except machines in the immediate vicinity. Created in the name of the Wither, this ancient war weapon mercilessly fires missiles, lasers, etc. at its target.

The Harbinger changes its attack mode at certain intervals and alternately fires missiles and lasers. Other attacks include rush, wither guided missiles, and death lasers. When exposed to the Death Laser, it instantly kills the target as it is an attack that ignores defense.

Fortunately, since it is a machine, the EMP attack works. In the room where the Harbinger is located, each of the six pillars is equipped with an EMP block, and when the lever is pulled, a magnetic field pulse is released, temporarily stopping most mechanical life forms, including the Harbinger, within range. EMP blocks are one-time use, but can be recharged via the Harbinger or Prowler's Death Laser.

When it dies, it struggles and causes a wide explosion. You must not relax until the very end.
ze.quest.273.title: unity
ze.quest.273.subtitle: mechanical fusion anvil
ze.quest.273.des: This is a mechanized anvil used when synthesizing Cataclysm equipment. The key ingredient is Witherite obtained from Harbinger.
ze.quest.274.title: Summon Calamity
ze.quest.274.subtitle: wither
ze.quest.274.des:
The Wither is a powerful monster that does not occur naturally and must be summoned artificially.

If you stack four soul sands in a ㅜ shape and place three Wither Skeleton skulls on top of them, the Wither will be summoned.

The Wither flies through the air and throws wither skulls at all nearby creatures except undead types, dealing area-wide damage. If any creature is hit by this projectile, the wither heals. A Wither whose health is below half is immune to ranged attacks except guns.
ze.quest.275.title: grave robber's paradise
ze.quest.275.subtitle: cursed pyramid
ze.quest.275.des:
Guided through the Desert Eye or rarely found in the desert, this massive pyramid is guarded by Koboleton, bony dinosaur-like enemies. This pyramid has all kinds of traps and powerful enemies placed inside to protect itself from grave robbers.

To awaken the powerful being here, you must brush the strange sand (the texture is slightly different) in the center of the pyramid with a solo.

The enemies here are skeletons, that is, undead type enemies, so weapons with the Smite enchantment are recommended. But be careful. Their main fighting strategy is to knock the weapon out of the target's hand. To prepare for this, we recommend making sticky gloves out of slime and wearing them.
ze.quest.276.title: two guardians of the pyramid
ze.quest.276.subtitle: Bazett and Kobol Radiator
ze.quest.276.des:
These two skeletons will stand in your way to protect the important person inside from the grave robbers.

Bazett is a snake-like skeleton who wields and stabs an ancient spear and performs magic, including creating sandstorms.

Kobolradiator is a massive skeleton that wields an ancient metal greatsword.

There are several of these two inside the pyramid, and two of them are guarding the lowest level.
ze.quest.277.title: the pyramid is alive
ze.quest.277.subtitle: remnants of antiquity
ze.quest.277.des:
If you brush the suspicious sand (the texture is slightly different) inside the pyramid solo, you can unearth the Desert Necklace. If you put this necklace on the ancient remnant guarded by Bazette and Kobolradiator in the room located under the huge tower located in the center of the pyramid, the ancient remnant will awaken.

Because Ancient Remnants only have bones, they do not take damage from arrows, but they take effective damage from hard enchantments, etc. However, like a giant dinosaur, every huge movement will be a fatal attack. When he stamps his feet, a seismic wave is created, which can be avoided by jumping. And after roaring loudly, it creates a sandstorm. If you come into contact with this storm, you will receive a debuff called the Desert Curse. The Desert Curse reverses the target's behavior.

There is a rage gauge below the health bar, and this gauge is charged when the Ancient Remnant fails to hit a direct attack. When fully charged, the Ancient Remnant rushes forward in anger, causing great damage to blocks and creatures.
ze.quest.278.title: Archeology mode (not)
ze.quest.278.subtitle: remnants of this world
ze.quest.278.des:
When you kill an Ancient Remnant, you will receive a Remnant Skull. This skull can be placed on the ground to summon a remnant of the present, and this small dinosaur can be tamed with a Sniffer's Egg.

It has high movement speed, health, and attack power, making it useful in ground battles, and can be restored through bones or koboleton bones. You can also right-click to make it follow you, move it as you want, or make it wait. And you can carry it around in a bucket.

When a Remnant of the World dies, it is guaranteed to drop a Remnant Skull. However, once you summon it, you must tame it again.
ze.quest.279.title: It won't be Atlantis
ze.quest.279.subtitle: sunken city
ze.quest.279.des:
Guided by the Eye of the Abyss or rarely found in all ocean biomes, this sunken city takes the form of a temple and is guarded by many Abyssalmen.

Basically, there will be a lot of moving around and fighting in the water, so it's a good idea to be prepared.
ze.quest.280.title: Leiatan's Call
ze.quest.280.subtitle: Abyssal Priest
ze.quest.280.des:
He is a priest-like Abyssman who swings a ceremonial dagger or emits a flash of light from the bladder on his head, inflicting blinding debuffs and damage to the target.

You can use his ceremonial dagger as a material to awaken the sleeping creatures in the sunken city.
ze.quest.281.title: Is this black magic?
ze.quest.281.subtitle: Abyssal Warlock
ze.quest.281.des:
He is an Abyssman with the status of a warlock. He uses magic that makes heat rays shoot out from the floor, and when he approaches, he threatens by swinging a ceremonial dagger.

You can use his ceremonial dagger as a material to awaken the sleeping creatures in the sunken city.
ze.quest.282.title: bunch of coral
ze.quest.282.subtitle: Coralthus
ze.quest.282.des:
This gigantic monster made of coral works together with the Abyssalers to stop invaders from entering the city.

All attacks disable shields, so be careful.

You can awaken the sleeping creatures in the sunken city using the coral fragments obtained by defeating him.
ze.quest.283.title: being of the abyss
ze.quest.283.subtitle: leviathan
ze.quest.283.des:
Leviathan is summoned by offering Abyssal Riches, made from sea resources, including ceremonial daggers and coral fragments, to the Abyssal Altar in the center of the city.

As it is an aquatic creature, it will swim quickly in the water and attack you by trapping you with its huge size. Additionally, Leviathan is invincible outside of water, so battles must be fought underwater. However, because it has the nature of a beast, it can attack ordinary aquatic creatures nearby, distracting them.

Please be careful because most of them are magic attacks, that is, attacks that ignore defense. One of its main skills, Abyss Heat Ray, gathers energy around its tentacles and fires a powerful beam from its mouth. It inflicts continuous damage to the target and destroys all blocks blocking the beam. Be careful because sometimes they will be trapped by tentacles and shoot rays directly at you.

Additionally, Leviathan's attacks mostly inflict debuffs, but if you have consumed Blessed Amethyst Crab Meat, you are immune to these attacks.
ze.quest.284.title: What is this
ze.quest.284.subtitle: amethyst crab
ze.quest.284.des:
Rarely found in the lush cave biome, this giant crab has a stone shell encrusted with moss and amethyst. Generally, they do not attack first and will counterattack when attacked.

It has high health and attack power, and combat can be tricky due to the many vines and water characteristic of the lush cavern in which this creature is found.

Items obtained from killing the Amethyst Crab can be used to craft armor or be sacrificed on the altar to be used as food to ignore debuffs from monsters you will fight later.
ze.quest.285.title: Crab burger recipe (estimated)
ze.quest.285.subtitle: Amethyst Altar and Blessed Amethyst Crab Meat
ze.quest.285.des:
You can obtain a Blessed Amethyst by offering crab meat obtained from an Amethyst Crab to the Amethyst Altar in the Sunken City.

Consuming this crab meat will make you immune to debuffs inflicted by Leviathan for a certain period of time.
ze.quest.286.title: unusual baby
ze.quest.286.subtitle: baby leviathan
ze.quest.286.des:
If you place the Abyss Egg obtained after defeating Leviathan and wait, a baby Leviathan will hatch. You can tame this baby Leviathan by feeding it tropical fish.

Although it is not invincible like its mother, it can be active on the ground, and although it is a baby, it can bite enemies in its mouth or shoot beams of light. You can make it follow you by right-clicking, have it move around at will, or have it wait, and you can carry it around by placing it in a bucket filled with water.
ze.quest.287.title: temple on the sea
ze.quest.287.subtitle: acropolis
ze.quest.287.des:
Guided through the eye of the storm or rarely found over the warm seas, this massive air temple is home to many powerful enemies in the form of seafood.

By defeating them, you can climb up fairly or use tricks such as jetpacks to go directly to the top floor and face powerful beings.
ze.quest.288.title: cold weather
ze.quest.288.subtitle: frost prison
ze.quest.288.des:
Guided by the Eye of the Cursed or rarely found on the snowy plains, this massive fortress is guarded by draugr, Endad-type monsters.

Most of them take extra damage from Smite enchantments, and dead draugrs will not be resummoned. However, having been trained in a harsh environment, they are immune to frostbite and each and every one of them is a powerful being.
ze.quest.289.title: empress of storms
ze.quest.289.subtitle: Scylla
ze.quest.289.des:
Scylla is summoned when you right-click on the huge anchor placed on the top floor of the Acropolis. She is armed with full armor and uses the giant anchor Keraunos as her main weapon to create lightning and waves when she fights.

If you are hit by her wave attack, you will receive a wet debuff, and if you are electrocuted while in this state, you will take damage that ignores your defense.
ze.quest.290.title: bittern
ze.quest.290.subtitle: aftgang
ze.quest.290.des:
This massive draugr has as much health and armor as its size, and attacks its enemies with a large axe.

Since the attack speed is slow, it is recommended to avoid the attack and then fight while dealing additional damage with a weapon enchanted with a strong strike.

Defeating him will give you the key to a sealed room located deep inside the prison.
ze.quest.291.title: berserker
ze.quest.291.subtitle: Maledictus
ze.quest.291.des:
If you right-click on the center of the sealed door using the strange key obtained by defeating Aftgangg, the seal will be broken and you will be able to enter the room. There is a cursed tombstone at the end of the room, and right-clicking on it will awaken Maledictus, the most powerful being in this prison and the overworld.

He attacks the target quickly with a high attack speed, and his anger gauge fills up every time the target is hit by the attack, and his attack power increases every time the gauge fills up. When the anger gauge is full, the annihilation skill is used. This attack deals damage that ignores defense and cannot be blocked even with a shield, so you must avoid it from a distance.

He fights, switching weapons to suit the situation. Normally, it uses two maces called the Annihilator, a cursed bow from a distance, and a wide range of attacks with the huge halberd Soul Crusher. Whenever your health gets lower, the skills you use increase.

Fortunately, however, he is affected by the Smite enchantment, has no ability to regenerate health during combat, and does not inflict any debuffs on the target. But he is still powerful.
ze.quest.292.title: dowsing machine
ze.quest.292.subtitle: meteorite detector
ze.quest.292.des:
Used when finding meteorites. When you hold it in your hand, the needle will point in the direction of a nearby meteorite, and when it reaches the meteorite, the needle will spin around.

In some cases, meteorites are buried deep in the ground.
ze.quest.293.title: look at this
ze.quest.293.subtitle: ping
ze.quest.293.des:
The Ping Wheel mode feature lets you ping what you're looking at by pressing T. That ping can also be seen by others. To adjust ping-related settings, you can press * on the number pad to open the ping menu.

By setting up a ping channel, you can make pings visible only to people on the same channel.

For your information, enter for chat.
ze.quest.294.title: At this level, it’s no cheat haha.
ze.quest.294.subtitle: Teleport command
ze.quest.294.des:
FTB Essentials mode allows you to teleport via commands.

/back will teleport you to the location before death or before teleportation.

/sethome saves your standing position and teleports you to the saved position using /home.

/rtp moves to random coordinates. Don't worry. The Y coordinate is set to the ground surface, so it does not fit anywhere.

If you use /tpa (user nickname), you will be teleported to the user's location. The command allows you to choose whether to accept or reject the player.

All teleportation commands have their own cooldown.
ze.quest.295.title: Eat the land
ze.quest.295.subtitle: zone protection
ze.quest.295.des:
FTB Chunks mode allows you to protect areas in chunks. Press the M key to open the entire map, then press the 'Chunk Protection (C)' button in the upper left corner to enter chunk protection mode.

In this mode, you can protect a chunk by clicking on it, and you can load the chunk by shift-clicking. Be careful because chunk loading can put a strain on the server.

Protected chunks cannot be placed or destroyed by other players, and chunk loaded chunks are always loaded when the server is running.

To unprotect and unload a chunk, simply right-click on it.
ze.quest.296.title: We're blah blah blah
ze.quest.296.subtitle: party system
ze.quest.296.des:
You can form a party through FTB Teams mode. Open your inventory and click the team icon (looks like a person) in the upper left corner to open the team menu.

Here you can create a party and invite your friends. Players in the same party share quest progress and can also share protected chunks.

To invite a friend, simply click the 'Invite' button in the team menu and enter your friend's nickname.
ze.quest.297.title: door to the void
ze.quest.297.subtitle: end portal
ze.quest.297.des:
By reading the books found in the base and solving the mysterious devices, you finally reach the place where the portal is. He must have defeated the Iron Knight or used some method, such as running away.

You see that there is a space in the dimension door frame where most things can be inserted, and you infer that you should insert the eyes you have collected so far. However, when you realize that you cannot insert more than two of the same eye, you realize that you need to find different types of eyes.

Can you truly achieve what mankind could not in the past?
ze.quest.298.title: a door with ten thousand branches
ze.quest.298.subtitle: quantum network card
ze.quest.298.des:
Unlimited range or dimensional base stations can be expensive as they require a lot of nether stars. If you can already build quantum networks, these quantum network cards will take their place.

By plugging a quantum network card into a wireless terminal and plugging in a quantum entanglement singularity such as a quantum network connected to the AE system, you will be able to access the AE system from anywhere. Quantum networks also transport power, providing enough power to ensure that wireless terminals do not run out of power.
ze.quest.299.title: marker
ze.quest.299.subtitle: Beacon and radio kit
ze.quest.299.des:
Beacons let the outside world know your location. And you will be able to communicate via radio kit.

Expect it to take a long time for them to receive your signal and see a response. Maybe... about a season...

And be careful. The radio kit's special frequency can attract powerful monsters nearby.
ze.quest.300.title: modular power suit
ze.quest.300.subtitle: mecha suit
ze.quest.300.des:
You can create a state-of-the-art electronic suit. Basically, when you charge the power and wear it, when you take damage, the suit consumes power by taking the damage that would otherwise go to you. Mecha Tool functions as a basic pickaxe, axe, and shovel and has moderate attack power.

To use them properly, each module must be installed through the module controller.
ze.quest.301.title: Power Armor Tinker Table
ze.quest.301.subtitle: module controller
ze.quest.301.des:
You can apply the desired module to each mecha suit or tool in the module controller.

To see the type of module, press U on the module base to check its usage.
ze.quest.302.title: beverage hat
ze.quest.302.subtitle: straw
ze.quest.302.des:
It bites the blaze burner and allows you to inhale the liquid right away.

You can connect liquid pipes directly. It can be heated by directly injecting liquid such as lava, and it can also be heated to ultra-high temperature with oil such as diesel oil.
ze.quest.303.title: compression design
ze.quest.303.subtitle: fan catalyst
ze.quest.303.des:
If you place a liquid in front of a fan, it is quite cumbersome to design it so that the liquid does not flow elsewhere. That's why this fan catalyst exists.

You can install this fan catalyst in front of the fan and fill the fan catalyst with any liquid you want. Also, if you want to use fire, just install netherrack and light it.
ze.quest.304.title: extreme sports
ze.quest.304.subtitle: folding glider
ze.quest.304.des: Foldable gliders function like elytra. However, because light materials are used to reduce weight, durability wears out quickly. Fortunately, repairs can be easily made on the anvil with heavy-duty cloth that is easy to find.
ze.quest.305.title: Our Crop Nutritional Snacks
ze.quest.305.subtitle: rich soil
ze.quest.305.des:
It would be a good idea to cultivate regular soil and plant the seeds, but it would be better to plant the seeds in better soil.

If you mix various natural by-products (monsters are also a part of nature) with the soil to make organic compost, install it in a place with enough sunlight and moisture, and give it time, it will gradually transform into rich soil.

Crops planted in rich soil receive a random growth promotion effect at certain intervals and grow faster.
ze.quest.306.title: catch
ze.quest.306.subtitle: weeds
ze.quest.306.des:
This plant, which can be found in nature or on your own farm, is a weed.

It is of no particular use and has the negative effect of converting surrounding crops into weeds, so if it is seen around the farm, it must be quickly removed.
ze.quest.307.title: where seeds grow
ze.quest.307.subtitle: hoe
ze.quest.307.des:
Many foods mostly call for several types of vegetables or fruits. To raise them, you need to farm.

Most crops are planted in tilled soil, which can be tilled with a hoe.

When crops grow, they must have water and sunlight or light nearby.
ze.quest.308.title: inventory management
ze.quest.308.subtitle: ME Requester
ze.quest.308.des:
The ME requestor automatically submits a combination request to ensure that the set quantity for registered items is always maintained. For example, if the stock of wooden planks falls below the set number, a request is made to make wooden planks using the registered pattern and a request is made to produce the set quantity.

Connect the ME requester to the ME system, register the desired item, liquid, or gas in the empty space in the ME requester, set the minimum stock in the inventory to make a request if there is stock below that number, and set the production quantity to set how much to make when making a request. Once settings are complete, you can apply the changes by clicking the check icon on the right.

You can manage a list of all requests you have applied through the ME Requests terminal.
ze.quest.309.title: construction tools
ze.quest.309.subtitle: Build, swap, copy paste gadgets
ze.quest.309.des:
These tools make construction easier. Basically, if you charge the power and have the materials, it will work.

Construction gadgets allow you to shape blocks according to the direction they are facing and place them by right-clicking.

The swap gadget can swap a range of blocks it is looking at for another block.

The copy and paste gadget allows you to specify a range by right-clicking or crouching and right-clicking, and then copy the blocks within the range and paste them to another location.

You can learn how to use each tool by holding the tool and holding G to open the UI.
ze.quest.310.title: time bill gates
ze.quest.310.subtitle: wait
ze.quest.310.des:
It appears that surrounding alien forces will contact you in approximately 6 days (2 hours).

Their language may be different from yours, but with the automatic translation function of the PDA you are looking at, communication will not be a big problem.

Have you ever thought about what you would do if they were a hostile force? ... It would be a good idea to prepare bullets and syringes first.
ze.quest.311.title: debut
ze.quest.311.subtitle: communication
ze.quest.311.des:
(Translated by PDA) We have picked up your signal. We are members of the Galactic Federation.

Our expedition team is now heading to your overworld, but it will take some time. Before that, we propose to trade with you through a small-quantity long-distance transmission system. According to our data, we have determined that the world you are on is home to rare life forms and valuable resources.

This radio channel has poor security, so we will contact you directly through your PDA. You no longer need to use the radio. If you wish to communicate peacefully with us, please accept our PDA.
ze.quest.312.title: hulk
ze.quest.312.subtitle: mutant zombie
ze.quest.312.des:
(Translated by PDA) We are collecting samples for mutant monsters. Please kill them and send us the data. We will provide compensation accordingly.

According to the information we have, mutant zombies respawn by rapidly dividing their cells before death. To suppress this, you will need to light a fire when it falls.
ze.quest.313.title: hunter
ze.quest.313.subtitle: mutant skeleton
ze.quest.313.des:
(Translated by PDA) We are collecting samples for mutant monsters. Please kill them and send us the data. We will provide compensation accordingly.

According to the information we have, when a mutant skeleton dies, its fragments spread everywhere. If you collect those fragments, you can create quite useful armor.
ze.quest.314.title: That big guy! There must be a lot of gunpowder!
ze.quest.314.subtitle: mutant creeper
ze.quest.314.des:
