(Translated by PDA) We are collecting samples for mutant monsters. Please kill them and send us the data. We will provide compensation accordingly.

According to the information we have, when the Mutant Creeper dies, it attracts nearby creatures and causes a widespread explosion, leaving behind an egg. If you take good care of that egg, a little creeper will hatch.
ze.quest.315.title: Slender Man
ze.quest.315.subtitle: Mutant Endermen
ze.quest.315.des:
(Translated by PDA) We are collecting samples for mutant monsters. Please kill them and send us the data. We will provide compensation accordingly.

According to the information we have, when mutant Endermen die, they attract nearby creatures and self-destruct by releasing all of their power.
ze.quest.317.title: Archeology mode without dinosaurs
ze.quest.317.subtitle: fossil excavation
ze.quest.317.des:
(Translated by PDA) The overworld is full of life forms you won't find on other planets. Their fossils are of great research value to us.

If you delicately excavate the soil where the fossil was buried with a brush, the bones will come out. Most of the bones will be broken due to age, but some bones will remain almost intact.
ze.quest.318.title: buried guardian
ze.quest.318.subtitle: Guardian Fossil
ze.quest.318.des:
(Translated by PDA) According to our information, guardians are unique creatures that guard their structures underwater and attack intruders with magical powers.

If there are Guardian Fossils nearby, you can gain the water breathing effect. Maybe the guardians of those days were friendly to humans.
ze.quest.319.title: real dinosaur
ze.quest.319.subtitle: chicken fossil
ze.quest.319.des:
(Translated by PDA) According to our information, the chickens currently in the overworld are probably genetically modified chickens. However, it is believed that there were unaltered chickens there in the past.

If you're near a chicken fossil, you'll get a slow fall effect. I don’t think even chickens could fly in those days.
ze.quest.320.title: Wolf MC
ze.quest.320.subtitle: wolf fossil
ze.quest.320.des:
(Translated by PDA) According to our information, the wolves currently in the overworld have relatively low wildness and are easy to tame. However, it is presumed that there were more wild wolves there in the past.

Wolf fossils are responsible for driving out surrounding skeletons. Presumably, wolves also hunted skeletons in those days.
ze.quest.321.title: ancient inhabitants
ze.quest.321.subtitle: resident fossil
ze.quest.321.des:
(Translated by PDA) According to our information, the intelligent life forms currently representing the Overworld are bipedal mammals called residents. In the past they appeared to have a more stooped posture.

You can make the resident fossil hold something. It is assumed that residents at that time were also able to pick up and use things.
ze.quest.322.title: Cat back then
ze.quest.322.subtitle: ocelot fossil
ze.quest.322.des:
(Translated by PDA) Ocelots are agile and alert animals of the cat family. According to our information, in the past in the overworld, ocelots could be tamed like cats. Nowadays, such technology may have been lost, and it is impossible to tame them, but cats are taking their place. Perhaps domesticated ocelots could be the cats of today.

Ocelot fossils are responsible for driving away nearby creepers. This fact can prove that ocelots and cats are closely related. ... Or you could say that ocelots are just felines.
ze.quest.323.title: For some, it may be a handle...
ze.quest.323.subtitle: sheep fossil
ze.quest.323.des:
(Translated by PDA) According to our information, the sheep currently in the overworld are those that have been domesticated. That's why it doesn't have horns. In the past, sheep in the Overworld are believed to have horns.

If you right-click on the sheep fossil, you can hear the unique sounds coming from its horns. Perhaps goats came from sheep in the past?
ze.quest.324.title: uncontrollable explosion
ze.quest.324.subtitle: Creeper Fossil
ze.quest.324.des:
(Translated by PDA) Creepers, unknown monsters that exist only in the overworld, are presumed to have been appearing in the overworld since ancient times.

When you place a Creeper Fossil... it just creates ominous particles around you. By the way, there was TNT in the body.
ze.quest.326.title: Eat with concern
ze.quest.326.subtitle: kettle
ze.quest.326.des:
You can make tea by boiling some plants in water. You need to heat the bottom with a stove, etc., and add liquid and items that match the recipe.

You can automate it by attaching pipes, etc. Items can be supplied at the top, and liquids can be added and removed at the sides. It's ugly, but the good thing is that it can be automated.
ze.quest.327.title: To eat the liver of a flea
ze.quest.327.subtitle: assignment screen
ze.quest.327.des:
(Translated by PDA) I'm glad you came out in favor. In the future, teams from each sector of our faction will contact you. Before that, some preparations will be needed to ensure a smoother exchange of information and resources.

Currently, our small-scale teleportation technology allows us to exchange items with you, but things that are not in a certain form, such as liquid power, cannot be transferred. Also, it is unreasonable to send and receive large amounts of things repeatedly. To solve this, it is recommended to create an assignment screen.

All you have to do is set up the assignment screen, specify what you want to send to us, and then connect pipes or wires.

If you don't have liquid pipes or equipment that can generate power, it's a good idea to have one ready.
ze.quest.328.title: flow of electrons
ze.quest.328.subtitle: biography submitted
ze.quest.328.des:
(Translated to PDA) I think it would be a good idea to check that the assignment screen is working first.

Since this is a pilot operation, you only need to send a small amount of power. Electric power is also needed to operate our power's facilities, and as the power supply has been unstable recently, we may be able to request power from you in the future.
ze.quest.329.title: H2O
ze.quest.329.subtitle: water submission
ze.quest.329.des:
(Translated to PDA) I think it would be a good idea to check that the assignment screen is working first.

Since this is a pilot operation, you only need to send a small amount of water. In addition to basic drinking water, water can be broken down into oxygen and hydrogen through electrolysis, so you'll be constantly asking for water.
ze.quest.330.title: Eunha Peace Company
ze.quest.330.subtitle: credit points
ze.quest.330.des:
(Translated to PDA) Okay. Now, there will be no major problems interacting with our forces. However, since barter alone will not be enough, we will introduce you to a currency that is used throughout the universe, including ours.

Credit points are used as currency for extraterrestrial trade. First of all, we recommend that you get it by doing business with us. At that point, other teams in our faction will also contact you.
ze.quest.331.title: started from beans
ze.quest.331.subtitle: Bio Research Team
ze.quest.331.des:
(Translated by PDA) Our Galactic Federation bio research team is mainly conducting research on life forms.

We are very interested in overworld creatures, ancient creatures, and mutants. We'll reward you if you dig up a fossil or provide us with a specimen of a mutant life form. Are you interested?
ze.quest.332.title: Another world
ze.quest.332.subtitle: Dimensional Ecosystem Research Team
ze.quest.332.des:
(Translated by PDA) Our galactic ecosystem research team is studying ecosystems in multiple dimensions.

The Overworld is a planet of possibilities where multiple dimensions can intersect. We will reward you if you explore the dimensions and provide us with samples.
ze.quest.333.title: Minecraft: Nether Under Overworld
ze.quest.333.subtitle: Netherrack
ze.quest.333.des:
(Translated by PDA) It is said that if you drill down from the overworld to the bedrock, you will be pulled into the Nether by an unknown dimensional force. Alternatively, if you make a portal frame out of obsidian and light it on fire, a portal to that place will open.

We need samples of that.
ze.quest.334.title: three idiots
ze.quest.334.subtitle: wither
ze.quest.334.des:
(Translated by PDA) When I analyzed the samples you provided, I discovered something interesting. If you place a corroded skull on soul sand, a new life will awaken through magical power.

It's still only a hypothesis, but you can prove it.
ze.quest.335.title: That big guy! There must be a lot of netherite!
ze.quest.335.subtitle: netherite monster
ze.quest.335.des:
(Translated by PDA) When I analyzed the samples you provided, I discovered something interesting. It seems that in the distant past, ancient intelligences existed in the Nether and developed to the point of building factories. What we noticed was the being made of netherite that they created.

Our research team is debating whether the being is a living being or a machine.
ze.quest.336.title: Ash to Ash to the other side
ze.quest.336.subtitle: Ignis
ze.quest.336.des:
(Translated by PDA) When I analyzed the samples you provided, I discovered something interesting. We found out that in the past, the Nether was destroyed after the dead entered it. And after one being appeared, the whereabouts of the dead seem to have become unclear.

We recommend that you prepare thoroughly as this is the entity that wiped out the beings that destroyed the ancient civilization.
ze.quest.337.title: Ending means starting again
ze.quest.337.subtitle: end stone
ze.quest.337.des:
(Translated by PDA) The End, the destination of all dimensions, is not an easy place to get to. But fortunately, thanks to the hard work of those in the overworld and you, we were able to open a portal to there.

We need samples from there.
ze.quest.338.title: Haraguro
ze.quest.338.subtitle: Ender Guardian
ze.quest.338.des:
(Translated by PDA) A citadel sits on the outskirts of the central island of End. At the lowest level there will be the castle owner.

They appear to be from the End, but after comparing them with the samples you sent, it turns out they are not. For what reason did they settle there?
ze.quest.339.title: Dovahkiin
ze.quest.339.subtitle: ender dragon
ze.quest.339.des:
(Translated by PDA) The creature protecting the End from outsiders on the central island of the End was found to be guarding its egg.

Although it can be assumed that it is a female because it incubates eggs, our research team considers the hypothesis that it could be a male guarding the last treasure left behind by the female it paired with.

Thank you for providing us with many valuable specimens so far. If you'd like to help us further, we'll send you a teleportation core as a reward to open a portal to another dimension.
ze.quest.340.title: Conquer the forest where the sun never sets
ze.quest.340.subtitle: twilight forest
ze.quest.340.des:
(Translated by PDA) The forest, where the twilight hours last, is a dimension where magical forces are more powerful than those of the Overworld. Even in our Galactic Federation, that dimension is considered a virtual dimension that only appears in our imaginations or fairy tales, but we think differently.

Please discover the creatures that exist there and provide samples.
ze.quest.341.title: military service
ze.quest.341.subtitle: combat support team
ze.quest.341.des:
(Translated by PDA) Our combat support team is responsible for supplying and supplying supplies for the security of the Union.

Weapons and supplies for battle are always needed. If you help us, we will compensate you appropriately.
ze.quest.342.title: the most primitive weapon
ze.quest.342.subtitle: classic weapons
ze.quest.342.des: (Translated by PDA) Our Galactic Federation is a fusion of diverse races and cultural forces. There are quite a few places where guns cannot be used. So, surprisingly, there are quite a few cases where you need a sword, bow, and arrows.
ze.quest.343.title: doping part 1
ze.quest.343.subtitle: liquid medicine
ze.quest.343.des: (Translated by PDA) Drugs are as important as weapons in combat. Wounds can be healed quickly and a soldier's physical capabilities can be raised to the limit.
ze.quest.344.title: Textbook Writing Part 1
ze.quest.344.subtitle: zombies and skeletons
ze.quest.344.des: (Translated by PDA) Due to the polluted environment, infected humans - zombies and skeletons - exist in some parts of the galaxy. We ask that you hunt them down and provide us with data so we can deal with them more effectively.
ze.quest.345.title: 2nd amendment
ze.quest.345.subtitle: self defense weapon
ze.quest.345.des: (Translated by PDA) Unless there are special circumstances, it is of course better to use a firearm. It is important for ordinary people to have weapons if possible. Even if it is not an automatic weapon, it is judged that pistols and shotguns are sufficient.
ze.quest.346.title: doping part 2
ze.quest.346.subtitle: syringe
ze.quest.346.des: (Translated by PDA) If you use a syringe, you can quickly inject the potion into your body for quick results.
ze.quest.347.title: Textbook Writing Part 2
ze.quest.347.subtitle: Husk and Stray
ze.quest.347.des: (Translated by PDA) There are also monsters that can survive in special environments. It may be difficult to see them in a normal environment, but on the contrary, there is a lack of information about them.
ze.quest.348.title: tactical choice
ze.quest.348.subtitle: regular army weapons
ze.quest.348.des: (Translated by PDA) Armament used by military personnel rather than civilians deals with things of a higher level.
ze.quest.349.title: doping part 3
ze.quest.349.subtitle: Reinforced Syringe
ze.quest.349.des: (Translated by PDA) It works better than regular syringes.
ze.quest.350.title: Textbook Writing Part 3
ze.quest.350.subtitle: Mutant zombies and skeletons
ze.quest.350.des:
(Translated by PDA) Among regular monsters, there are times when mutations appear with an extremely rare probability. They are very powerful and difficult to suppress properly.

If you have a hard time finding them, get a potion called 'Chemical X' from another team and throw it at the monsters. Of course, if you can afford it.
ze.quest.351.title: department store
ze.quest.351.subtitle: Daily necessities supply team
ze.quest.351.des:
(Translated by PDA) Our daily necessities supply team is responsible for supplying relief materials and luxury goods to most coalition forces.

If you provide us with drinking water and food, we will provide you with appropriate compensation and tell you how to produce tea and coffee.
ze.quest.352.title: Rice core
ze.quest.352.subtitle: bread and baked potatoes
ze.quest.352.des: (Translated by PDA) We are distributing basic foods such as bread and potatoes to places where supplies are difficult for some of our galactic forces.
ze.quest.353.title: drinking water
ze.quest.353.subtitle: water
ze.quest.353.des: (Translated by PDA) Most living things require water. You don't have to worry too much about water quality. We just have to purify it ourselves.
ze.quest.354.title: for the tongue
ze.quest.354.subtitle: sugar and salt
ze.quest.354.des: (Translated by PDA) These are ingredients that are not necessary, but are needed to eat higher quality food.
ze.quest.355.title: If that money-
ze.quest.355.subtitle: Meatball pasta and fried rice
ze.quest.355.des: (Translated by PDA) Members of most galactic powers can afford to eat above average food. ..as long as you pay a small amount.
ze.quest.356.title: tea time
ze.quest.356.subtitle: green tea
ze.quest.356.des:
(Translated by PDA) Tea is not an essential element, but it is a useful element for physical and mental stability and relaxation.

You will have received tea seeds as a reward for the previous quest. If you lose it, you can buy it again by paying a small amount of money.

If you plant tea seeds on the soil and wait, a tea tree will grow. If the tea tree is fully grown, you can obtain tea leaves by cutting off the leaves with scissors (right-clicking), and the growth stage of the tea tree is reset.

At this time, the color of the leaves of the fully grown tea tree changes over time, and the tea that can be brewed varies depending on the color. First, start by obtaining green tea leaves of the first color and steeping them to make green tea.
ze.quest.357.title: Diabetes-inducing substances
ze.quest.357.subtitle: chocolate bar
ze.quest.357.des:
(Translated by PDA) Chocolate is the cause of many complications, including diabetes, but there are quite a few people who will starve to death if they don't eat it.

When you heat and mix sugar, cocoa beans, and milk, it becomes chocolate, and when you compress it, it becomes a chocolate bar, which will become a favorite food that can be easily carried around.
ze.quest.358.title: Process for making caffeine
ze.quest.358.subtitle: coffee bush
ze.quest.358.des:
(Translated by PDA) Most of the faction members are drinking coffee to work efficiently. The number of people who drink alcohol outside of work is also increasing significantly.

You may have received coffee beans as a reward for previous quests. If you lose it, you can buy it again by paying a small amount of money.

Coffee beans require a rather unusual growing process. Coffee beans are planted on basalt rock and grow by absorbing other grown crops around them. Once the coffee bushes have grown to a certain level, coffee berries will grow, which can be harvested by right-clicking on them.
ze.quest.359.title: barista
ze.quest.359.subtitle: coffee
ze.quest.359.des: (Translated by PDA) Coffee fruits are processed on a cutting board, etc. to obtain coffee beans, which are then brewed to become coffee.
ze.quest.360.title: Tech Steve Save The World
ze.quest.360.subtitle: Engineer team
ze.quest.360.des:
(Translated by PDA) Covers the technology of galactic forces.

We are always short of machine parts and fuel. If you help us, we will give you appropriate compensation and materials that are difficult to find in the overworld.
ze.quest.361.title: pseudo-artificial sun
ze.quest.361.subtitle: nuclear fusion reactor
ze.quest.361.des:
Generating power through nuclear fission is good, but you always have to worry about radiation leaks. So the alternative power generation method is nuclear fusion.

Nuclear fusion basically works with D-T fuel and a large amount of energy is applied.
ze.quest.361.des2:
Fusion reactors are relatively simple in form (although the materials are not).

It basically has a spherical shape, with the border being the fusion reactor frame and the rest being the fusion reactor controller, ports, and laser focus matrix. As with other structures, the excess parts can be used as fusion furnace glass.

You only need one laser focus matrix, but you can install at least two fusion reactor ports, but the recommended number is three, and if you use the fusion reactor in a different way, which will be explained later, you need to install up to four ports.
ze.quest.362.title: high temperature frustration beam
ze.quest.362.subtitle: Lasers and Laser Amplifiers
ze.quest.362.des:
To initiate fusion, a high-power laser is temporarily needed.

Position the laser amplifier so that it faces the laser focusing matrix of the fusion reactor, and point the laser towards the other side of the laser amplifier.

Right-click on the laser amplifier to open the GUI, set the redstone recognition mode to Normal or Pulse, and power the laser to recharge the laser amplifier. In order to start nuclear fusion, the laser (power) must be supplied to the laser amplifier up to at least 400,000,000 (400M) FE.

Laser amplifiers can be installed in one long row, and the remaining area can be filled with lasers to increase the laser charging speed. However, space is needed to provide a redstone signal to the laser amplifier closest to the laser focus matrix. Just firing the laser will destroy regular blocks, so be careful when installing it.
ze.quest.363.title: water has power
ze.quest.363.subtitle: Electric pump and filter upgrades
ze.quest.363.des:
Electric filters are good liquid pumps, but what sets them apart from others is that they can extract gray water if you install a filter upgrade. This heavy water is a key element in the production of D-T fuel, a nuclear fusion fuel.

D-T fuel is produced by electrolyzing heavy water in an electrolytic separator to separate it into deuterium and oxygen, and mixing the deuterium with tritium in a chemical reaction device.

Tritium is converted to lithium by evaporating water into brine and liquid lithium in a thermal evaporation device, and then vaporizing the liquid lithium in a rotating condenser. Lithium is then processed in a solar neutron activator to complete tritium.

Yes, all of these processes require only water and power.
ze.quest.364.title: butterfly effect
ze.quest.364.subtitle: Hololium
ze.quest.364.des:
Once the D-T fuel and 400M FE laser are ready, the fusion reactor is ready to operate.

But you have to decide. D-T fuel can be processed in advance and supplied to the fusion reactor, but if deuterium and tritium are supplied separately from the fusion reactor, more D-T fuel will be consumed by processing the fusion reactor itself. This is why the recommended number of fusion reactor ports is three.

Anyway, once you've made your decision, supply fuel, connect the output section to a suitable power storage device, and finally stop firing the laser. Because there is really only one last step left. You need an item called Hololium. Just fill the Hololium with D-T fuel and attach it to the fusion reactor controller, and you're ready.

When the laser is fired, the fusion reactor consumes D-T fuel to produce massive amounts of power. If the fusion reactor stops operating due to lack of D-T fuel, you need to supply D-T fuel to the holrium again and collect 400M FE laser again. Make sure you have enough fuel to produce at least that much power.
ze.quest.364.des2:
There are actually two operating methods for a nuclear fusion reactor. One is the air cooling method explained earlier, and the other is the water cooling method.

Water cooling must be coupled to industrial turbines, similar to nuclear fission generators. Yes, you need more ports to drain coolant and used coolant. If this method is used well, it is possible to produce more power by combining the fusion reactor's own power production and the turbine's additional power production, but it will be quite difficult. and

And if you use the water cooling method, you can adjust the fuel consumption rate, but in this case, D-T fuel must be manufactured and supplied in advance. This is because the amount of D-T fuel that can be produced in a fusion reactor is limited.
ze.quest.365.title: lump of gears
ze.quest.365.subtitle: precision machinery
ze.quest.365.des:
(Translated as PDA) Relatively simple, yet multi-functional, precision mechanical devices become key components of simple machines throughout the galaxy.

Even civilizations with a basic level of technology can easily create one. This is one of the reasons why you can see it everywhere in the overworld.
ze.quest.366.title: molten rock
ze.quest.366.subtitle: lava
ze.quest.366.des:
(Translated by PDA) Lava, one of the liquids that can easily obtain high heat, can be made by melting stones at high temperature and can be easily found in nature.

According to information from the Dimensional Ecology Research Team, lava is a common liquid in the Nether. They say you can get a lot of lava there.
ze.quest.367.title: lump of iron
ze.quest.367.subtitle: engineering blocks
ze.quest.367.des: (Translated to PDA) Engineering blocks are used as materials for machines higher than Create level. Because it is made of iron or steel, it is perfect for making large, strong, and rugged machines.
ze.quest.368.title: Where democracy is headed
ze.quest.368.subtitle: via
ze.quest.368.des:
(Translated by PDA) Obtained by processing petroleum, this oil has a high combustion rate, making it an excellent generator fuel.

It is a fuel mainly used by civilizations with considerable technological prowess.
ze.quest.369.title: External pressures to use oil
ze.quest.369.subtitle: steel casing
ze.quest.369.des:
(Translated as PDA) This casing, which is based on steel and contains electronic circuits and precision machinery, is a component that can be considered the pinnacle of technology.

You can make it using petroleum coke, a processed petroleum product, but if you cannot afford it, you can make it by consuming a resource called Netherite in the Nether. However, our information suggests that netherite may be harder to obtain than petroleum coke.

If you have reached this level of technology, consider purchasing some plastics from us and taking advantage of our technologies.
ze.quest.370.title: Drive through
ze.quest.370.subtitle: Liquefied D-T Fuel
ze.quest.370.des:
(Translated by PDA) Most ships of the Galactic Federation generate electricity through nuclear fusion. The fuel used at that time is D-T fuel.

To facilitate transportation, it is usually converted to a liquid state and stored.
ze.quest.371.title: plasteel
ze.quest.371.subtitle: plastic
ze.quest.371.des: I got their plastic from the Galactic Federation. It can replace some of the Duroplast we used, and it will be possible to manufacture machines that can only be made with this plastic.
ze.quest.372.title: Introduction to automatic farming
ze.quest.372.subtitle: foundation machine frame
ze.quest.372.des:
Based on a steel casing, the basic machine frame can be manufactured using preservative wood and plastic.

It is the basis of the Galactic Federation's automated farms and factories, and can be later strengthened to produce higher-level machines.
ze.quest.373.title: Jwaap
ze.quest.373.subtitle: Fluid extractor and latex processing unit
ze.quest.373.des:
You can process plastic directly.

When you place a log of wood in front of the fluid extractor, the fluid extractor pulls the latex out of the tree. Then, the latex is processed in a latex processing unit to obtain dry rubber, and finally, heat treatment is performed to complete the plastic.

Fluid extractors can operate slowly without electricity, but latex processing units must operate with power and water.
ze.quest.374.title: unity
ze.quest.374.subtitle: melting room
ze.quest.374.des: It is a machine that combines multiple items or liquids to create different materials. This allows you to craft useful tools or craft the next level of machinery.
ze.quest.375.title: trauma maker
ze.quest.375.subtitle: mob slaughter factory
ze.quest.375.des:
Kills creatures in front of the machine, turning them into liquid meat and soft mince.

Friendly creatures like animals produce more tender mince than hostile creatures like monsters.
ze.quest.376.title: Adaptation of automatic farming
ze.quest.376.subtitle: beginner machine frame
ze.quest.376.des: This is a machine frame that can be manufactured from various materials and latex in a melting room.
ze.quest.377.title: Specialization in automated farming
ze.quest.377.subtitle: advanced machine frame
ze.quest.377.des: A beginner mechanical frame that can be crafted in the melting room using various materials and soft minced meat.
ze.quest.378.title: ice! You have to take my word for it!
ze.quest.378.subtitle: still room
ze.quest.378.des: It freezes all creatures within range of the top of the machine and also heals them slightly for preservation. Thanks to the safety features, humans are not significantly affected.
ze.quest.379.title: Put a straw on the top of your head
ze.quest.379.subtitle: Fluid laser base and laser drill
ze.quest.379.des:
The Fluid Laser Base can extract specific fluids based on the biome or target at the bottom of the machine. Additionally, the color of the installed laser lens must match the conditions.

By placing the Wither (yes, I'm talking about that Boss Wither) right at the bottom of the machine and equipping it with a purple laser lens, you can craft high-end machine frames or extract ether gas, which adds useful functions to other machines (for technical reasons, it can be transported and stored in liquid pipes, tanks, etc.).

To operate a laser base, you must have a nearby laser drill powered and a laser base within range of the laser drill.
ze.quest.380.title: The end of automatic farming
ze.quest.380.subtitle: Top quality machine frame
ze.quest.380.des:
You can create high-end machine frames by processing various materials and ether gas in the melting room.

Aether Gas must be obtained from the Wither by the Fluid Laser Base. The Wither is a dangerous entity, so it is important to neutralize it using devices such as stasis chambers. This requires a fluid laser base directly above the wither to properly extract the ether gas.

When etheric gas is extracted from the Wither, it will take some damage, but will heal again if it is in the Stasis Chamber.
ze.quest.381.title: Real automatic farming
ze.quest.381.subtitle: plant harvester and planter
ze.quest.381.des:
Plant harvesters harvest plants within the frontal range of the machine. When cutting down a tree, the connected logs and leaves are also cut down. Each time it is operated, waste accumulates inside the machine. And when you supply ether, you harvest the plants and then replant them.

The planter plants plants (such as seeds or seedlings) in the upper range of the machine. Each color is displayed in the inventory inside the machine, so you can set up crops to plant according to the location of each color. However, in the default state, the range is only 1 block, so this function will be used after the range is upgraded.
ze.quest.382.title: Relatively convenient mineral refining 5 times
ze.quest.382.subtitle: Washing plants, fermenters and fluid sieves
ze.quest.382.des:
In order to refine minerals 5 times with Mekanism technology, many machines and facilities are required. However, if you use the Galactic Federation's technology, it can be purified more easily.

In a washing plant, raw ore meat is made by mixing the ore to be refined with liquefied meat.

Ferment raw ore meat in a fermenter. At this point, you can decide how much you want to refine the ore. The higher the fermentation rate, the more demanding the time and resources required.

Finally, the fermented ore meat can be converted into powder of the mineral by filtering it through sand in a fluid sieve.

As you can see from the process, the factory that continues to kill living things must be activated, and ether gas must be extracted from the Wither to achieve the maximum 5-fold purification. Moreover, for technical reasons, this process is only possible for some minerals. You can just use the original Mekanism refining process.
ze.quest.383.title: bifurcation
ze.quest.383.subtitle: Transcendent Engineering Parts
ze.quest.383.des:
(Translated by PDA) Your continued help has been of great help to our Galactic Federation recently. So, after some big and small discussions, we would like to give you a gift and a suggestion.

We are planning to give you transcendental engineering parts as a gift. Since it is the core and a collection of all technologies of our Galactic Federation, we only supply a very small amount to those we can trust. And it is also a key part of the spacecraft.

Yes, we want to help you escape the overworld. Of course, it's your choice. You may not want to leave a settlement you are already familiar with. So we want to give you a choice as well. Whatever you do with those transcendental engineering parts, we won't be involved. However, if you want to escape the overworld, you must keep the parts carefully and use them as the last parts of the escape spaceship.
ze.quest.384.title: Preparing for spacecraft construction
ze.quest.384.subtitle: bulk transportation
ze.quest.384.des:
(Translated by PDA) Building a spaceship requires a large amount of resources and space.

Don't worry. We can install a virtual building system on your PDA. Once you gather resources and store them in your PDA, the construction system will assemble itself according to the optimized blueprint.

So all you have to do now is find the resources.
ze.quest.385.title: That big guy! There must be a lot of electricity!
ze.quest.385.subtitle: spacecraft storage battery [inductive matrix]
ze.quest.385.des: (Translated as PDA) It is responsible for storing the spacecraft's power. A large-capacity power storage facility is needed in case the backup power generation facility cannot operate.
ze.quest.386.title: The pinnacle of alien technology
ze.quest.386.subtitle: Spacecraft storage system [MEGA storage cell]
ze.quest.386.des:
(Translated as PDA) It is a system for storing various elements (items, liquids, gases, etc.) within a spacecraft.

The AE system is not a unique technology of our Galactic Federation. But even if you don’t know its origins, you can still make it and use it.
ze.quest.387.title: origin of life
ze.quest.387.subtitle: Spaceship Resources [Water]
ze.quest.387.des:
(Translated by PDA) It is indispensable to basic living organisms, and oxygen can be obtained through electrolysis.

Water in the overworld can be produced infinitely with just two buckets, but it loses its properties when it goes into space.
ze.quest.388.title: Space Food (Despair)
ze.quest.388.subtitle: Spaceship Resources [Nutritional Paste]
ze.quest.388.des:
(Translated by PDA) It is best to store food in nutritional paste form in case you are on board the spacecraft for an extended period of time.

As a side note, some forces also call it antelope porridge.
ze.quest.389.title: Nutrition porridge
ze.quest.389.subtitle: nutrient liquefaction machine
ze.quest.389.des:
This is a machine that processes food into nutritional paste. In the process, the nutrients in the food are destroyed, but essential nutrients remain, so it is recommended to process low-quality foods into a paste.

You can put the paste in a water container and consume it whenever you want.
ze.quest.390.title: final step
ze.quest.390.subtitle: Spaceship core parts [transcendent engineering parts]
ze.quest.390.des:
(Translated by PDA) If you have come this far, I believe you have already decided to escape the overworld. Now, it is time to add the last part, the transcendental engineering part we gifted you, into the construction system.

With the final trans-engineering components, the construction system will begin constructing the spaceship. However, the time is in overworld time, so it will take a total of 8 days. Under normal circumstances, time is not an issue, but due to the special nature of Trans-Engineering components, your PDA can become a marker that powerful creatures can warp to.

good luck.
ze.quest.391.title: I swear to the truth.
ze.quest.391.subtitle: first day
ze.quest.391.des:
The first creature warps.

(Translated by PDA) Until the trans-engineering components are stabilized, creatures will warp above your head every day or so.

There are approximately 7 days left until stabilization. I hope you endure until the end.
ze.quest.392.title: I swear by the calendar.
ze.quest.392.subtitle: second day
ze.quest.393.title: I swear on language.
ze.quest.393.subtitle: third day
ze.quest.394.title: I swear by my values.
ze.quest.394.subtitle: fourth day
ze.quest.395.title: I swear by the rules.
ze.quest.395.subtitle: fifth day
ze.quest.396.title: Swear on meaning.
ze.quest.396.subtitle: sixth day
ze.quest.397.title: I pledge to human dignity.
ze.quest.397.subtitle: seventh day
ze.quest.398.title: Journey so far
ze.quest.398.subtitle: eighth day
ze.quest.398.des:
(Translated to PDA) The stabilization of transcendental engineering parts has finally been completed. Now the creatures' warp is over.

Just wait one more day and the spaceship will finally be completed and you will be able to escape.
ze.quest.399.title: coke oven v2
ze.quest.399.subtitle: Advanced coke kiln
ze.quest.399.des:
It's nice compared to traditional coke ovens. Additionally, a dedicated input/output port has been added, and attachments can be attached to speed up the oven (kiln).

For construction instructions, check the engineer's manual or search for advanced coke kiln.
ze.quest.400.title: Oven DLC
ze.quest.400.subtitle: Advanced coke kiln base heater
ze.quest.400.des: It can be attached to both sides of a high-quality coke kiln and provides power to increase the oven (kiln) speed.
ze.quest.401.title: It was nice to meet you, let's not meet again.
ze.quest.401.subtitle: escape ending
ze.quest.401.des:
(Translated by PDA) The spacecraft has been completed. Now, at the touch of a button, a ship from the building system will be summoned to pick you up and escape the overworld.

The next destination is up to you. You can return to your home world, or you can set out to find another planet. Of course, you are welcome to join our Galactic Federation. Rather, we hope for that.

(The developer's comments are on the next page]
ze.quest.401.des2:
Thank you for playing Zero to Engineering.

In the story, a spaceship should appear in front of you that has stolen a huge amount of your resources, but I don't think that will be possible due to my capabilities. Anyway, according to the story, you have escaped the overworld.

Of course, that's the story, you're still in the Overworld (or whatever dimension you're in). There is no problem if you complete additional quests or personal goals that you were unable to clear.

Anyway, thanks again for playing. -Empty465(Tottteottteot)
ze.quest.402.title: the light will guide you
ze.quest.402.subtitle: projector
ze.quest.402.des:
This is a tool that places holograms that will help you build the desired multi-block machine (Immersive Engineering series).

If a shader is being applied, it will not be visible due to a bug. When using a projector, we recommend turning off shaders for a while.
ze.quest.403.title: Where are you?
ze.quest.403.subtitle: cataclysm snow
ze.quest.403.des:
In order to find powerful beings of Cataclysm, it is recommended to craft and use the corresponding dungeon eyes rather than searching blindly. Throwing the snow will lead you to a nearby dungeon. Don't worry, these eyes won't be damaged.

You can also visually interact with the respawn of a boss you've already dealt with to resurrect that being.
ze.quest.404.title: the beginning of pain
ze.quest.404.subtitle: a suspicious signal
ze.quest.404.des:
(Suspicious signal) We confirmed that you obtained the transcendental engineering parts. And I know you're wondering what to spend it on.

If you complete all the tasks we give you, we will provide you with a Transcendental Engineering Part. If that happens, we will be able to reach the ultimate technology and complete the spaceship at the same time.

The choice is yours.
ze.quest.405.title: Hidden ending
ze.quest.405.subtitle: Transcendent Engineering Parts
ze.quest.405.des:
(Question signal) You have completed all the tasks we have given you. It must have been a painful process that began with your desire to choose two when you had to choose only one.

Get rewarded for your hard work.
ze.quest.406.title: abandon the weak body
ze.quest.406.subtitle: human body parts
ze.quest.406.des:
(Doubtful signal) The human body is weak and has little scalability. A wise engineer's virtue is to improve things by replacing them with machines.

Provide the remaining parts after being replaced by the machine. You don't need to know where to use it.
ze.quest.407.title: extreme art
ze.quest.407.subtitle: Netherite Armor on the verge of destruction
ze.quest.407.des:
(Suspicious signal) Armor made of netherite is a very sturdy piece of equipment, and it can be said to be the dream of almost every soldier. But we ask for something more unusual.

Basically, it must be given Protection 4, Durability 3, and Repair, and the helmet, boots, and leggings must be additionally enchanted. The most important factor is that this armor must be on the verge of destruction.
ze.quest.408.title: Eyes that look straight into fear
ze.quest.408.subtitle: eye
ze.quest.408.des:
(Question signal) There are eyes that are used to point to a specific place or perform a ritual.

Please provide one of each.
ze.quest.409.title: colonial rule
ze.quest.409.subtitle: colonial artifacts
ze.quest.409.des:
(Question signal) Provide products of the colony's unique technology that you cannot produce yourself.

These are things that can be obtained in colonies that have achieved some level of development.
ze.quest.410.title: That cake is a lie!
ze.quest.410.subtitle: chocolate cake
ze.quest.410.des: (Doubtful signal) Cake always tells the truth. Therefore, we provide cake during depression counseling.
ze.quest.411.title: Is the overworld sky fake?
ze.quest.411.subtitle: escape the atmosphere
ze.quest.411.des:
(Interrogative signal) Think about it. Wouldn't you be able to escape the overworld if you flew straight into the sky? Give it a try.

Any means may be used. You can use the explosive recoil to reach it, or you can also use a jetpack. However, I recommend not expecting any results.
ze.quest.411.task: Reach Y 10,000 at coordinates where X and Z are both 0.
ze.quest.412.title: Steve LV.999
ze.quest.412.subtitle: level reached
ze.quest.412.des: (Interrogative signal) Have a lot of experience, and give us that experience.
ze.quest.413.title: permanent organ
ze.quest.413.subtitle: creative motor
ze.quest.413.des: It produces infinite power and can adjust desired speed and direction.
ze.quest.414.title: infinite power
ze.quest.414.subtitle: creative generator
ze.crafting.steelC_1_des: This is a method of making steel casing using nether steel.
ze.crafting.steelC_2_des:
A method of making steel casing that uses petroleum coke blocks instead of netherite steel.

You get two casings.
ze.crafting.steelC_3_des:
This is a steel casing manufacturing method that involves injecting ether gas into a melting chamber and inserting AE processors.

You will get five casings.

To easily obtain ether gas from the Wither, you must stop it in the Stasis Chamber.
ze.crafting.ammo_1_des: This is how to craft ammunition (TacZ) at the ammunition workbench.
ze.crafting.ammo_2_des:
This is a method of producing ammunition (TacZ) excluding explosive shells or pellets by sequential assembly.

To do so, based on the desired ammunition, use brass plate, gunpowder, and warhead materials suitable for the bullet and finish by pressing, resulting in better efficiency than basic production.

Incomplete ammunition refers to ammunition that is currently being assembled.
ze.crafting.steel_1_des:
This is a method of smelting steel using coke as fuel in a blast furnace (Immersive Engineering).

One coke block can smelt 10 iron. One regular coke can only smelt one iron ingot, so it is slightly more efficient.
ze.crafting.steel_2_des:
How to smelt steel through a metallurgical injector.

First, you can inject 10mB of carbon into an iron ingot to process it into concentrated iron, and then inject 10mB of carbon again to smelt it into steel powder. Afterwards, you can obtain steel ingots by roasting the steel powder in a furnace, etc.

Although it may be more cumbersome than smelting in a furnace, a concentrator processes one piece of coal or charcoal (or coke) into concentrated carbon, making it efficient enough to smelt 4 iron ingots with one carbon.
ze.crafting.andCasing_1_des: This is a method of making andesite cases using andesite alloy on debarked wood.
ze.crafting.andCasing_2_des:
This is a method of manufacturing andesite casing using preserved wood and andesite alloy.

You will get 4 cases.
ze.crafting.andAlloy_1_des: This is a method of making andesite alloy by combining two pieces of andesite and steel.
ze.crafting.andAlloy_2_des:
This is a method of making andesite alloy by mixing andesite and steel pieces in a mixer.

Only one andesite and one piece of steel are required at this time.
ze.smelting.recycle.tc: You can extract metal by melting metal ores or items.
ze.smelting.alloy.tc: Molten metal can be smelted into alloys.
ze.smelting.alloy.c: Metals can be mixed and smelted into alloys while heated to a high temperature.
ze.smelting.alloy.ie: Metals can be smelted into alloys at high temperatures.
ze.smelting.crush.tc: You can also collect by-products from melting metal ores.
ze.smelting.crush.c: By grinding and washing metal ores, you can also collect by-products.
ze.smelting.crush.ie: By grinding metal ores, you can obtain additional ore powder as a by-product.
ze.smelting.crush.ie2: By smelting metal ores at high heat, you can obtain additional ore ingots as a by-product.
ze.smelting.chamber.a: Grind the ore into powder and refine it twice as much.
ze.smelting.chamber.b: The ore is made into lumps and refined three times.
ze.smelting.chamber.c: Turn the ore into fragments and refine it four times.
ze.smelting.chamber.d: The ore is made into a slurry and refined five times.
ze.smelting.chamber.e: The ore is mixed with liquified meat to refine it up to five times.
ze.buy.se.des: It is a technology of the Galactic Federation that can put living things, including animals, in egg form in small eggs. When an egg is used, the creature will emerge from the egg and require Galactic Federation technology to return it to the egg.
ze.buy.chi.des: (Translated by PDA) It is a genetically modified chicken found in the overworld. Its characteristics include the ability to lay eggs and reproduce regardless of gender, and the ability to lay fertilized eggs independently with probability.
ze.buy.cow.des: (Translated by PDA) It is a genetically modified cow also found in the Overworld, and its characteristics include the ability to milk it with a bucket and breed regardless of gender.
ze.buy.sheep.des: (Translated by PDA) It is a genetically modified sheep also found in the Overworld. Its characteristic feature is that it grows fur as soon as it consumes grass, has high hair removal efficiency, and can breed regardless of gender.
ze.buy.bee.des: (Translated by PDA) It is a genetically modified bee also found in the overworld. Its characteristic feature is that when it is transporting honey, it sprays particles that help the growth of plants below its path and can reproduce regardless of gender.
ze.buy.pig.des: (Translated by PDA) It is a genetically modified pig also found in the overworld. Its features include being able to ride with a saddle, control it with a carrot fishing rod, and being able to breed regardless of gender.
ze.buy.cx.des: (Translated by PDA) If you need samples of mutant monsters but are having trouble finding them, you can artificially create them yourself. Throwing this potion at a monster has a high chance of turning it into a mutant.
ze.buy.plastic.des:
(Translated by PDA) Plastics allow us to create machines that embody the technology of our Galactic Federation.

Instructions for use will be sent to your PDA. The translation has been done in advance.
ze.buy.tea_seed.des: (Translated by PDA) You can grow tea plants and steep the leaves to make tea.
ze.buy.coff_seed.des: (Translated by PDA) You can grow coffee bushes, pick the berries, and brew coffee.
ze.buy.glu_inject.des:
(Translated by PDA) A glucose syringe allows you to quickly satisfy your hunger by injecting glucose directly into your body.

Since it is a glucose-only injection, you will not receive any other nutrient benefits, but it may be useful in emergency situations.
ze.buy.nightvision.des: (Translated by PDA) This is a potion that helps you see dark places brightly.
ze.buy.exMag.des: (Translated by PDA) Hold more ammunition than a standard magazine.
ze.buy.slotM.des:
(Translated as PDA) Although not productive, it is a fairly popular pastime in the Galactic Federation.

It is a pastime where you insert credit points into the machine and activate it, and you are rewarded for matching three identical pictures. The built-in small instantaneous device allows operation without space constraints.

The rewards are random collectible figures, and if you collect certain sets, you can sell them for a lot of credit points.

Don't get so caught up in it that you go bankrupt.
ze.sell.cx.des:
(Translated by PDA) You can create potions with elements obtained from mutant monsters, and through these potions, you can create other mutants.

It's risky, so if you donate to our members, we'll give you a small reward. If you are able, please continue to donate.
ze.sell.fossil: Dig the ground. Money... is coming.
ze.sell.fossil.des: (Translated by PDA) If you donate your excavated fossils to our association, we promise to give you a small reward. It would be nice if it was an ongoing transaction as it would require quite a few samples.
ze.sell.zero: Figure Mania [RE: Life in another world starting from zero]
ze.sell.chain.des: (Translated by PDA) Something wasn't happy, right?
ze.sell.lou.des: (Translated by PDA) When is Part 2 coming out?
item.kubejs.hand.tooltip: The contents are damaged and nothing can be saved.
item.kubejs.start_kit.tooltip: You can obtain the contents by pressing the interact key while holding it in your hand.
item.kubejs.un_ammo.tooltip: This is unfinished ammunition. Next, complete the Create sequence assembly.
item.kubejs.money.tooltip: It is a common currency used when transacting with alien worlds.
item.kubejs.transcendent_engineering_par:
§e§oIt is the crystal of the Galactic Federation's technological singularity and will be a key material for spacecraft.
Or... make it a foundation for creating more transcendent things. §r
lantern.tooltip: §e§oIf installed, you can retrieve it by crouching and right-clicking §r
ze.tip.diet:
If you eat well, you can receive various buffs, including maximum health.
However, nutrients are reset upon death. And if your sugar levels are too high, you will be in a constant state of hunger.
ze.tip.emi:
If there is an item you want to see the recipe for, you can search for the item in the search box at the bottom of the inventory and check the recipe by clicking on the item displayed on the right or pressing R.
Left-click or press U to see where it is used.
ze.tip.jade:
Information about the block you are looking at is displayed at the top center, and if this bothers you, you can turn it off by pressing number 1 on the number pad.
Additionally, you can find out the combination method and usage through number pad 3 and 4.
ze.tip.skill: You can open the skill window by pressing Alt+`. You can increase each stat by consuming experience points.
ze.tip.claim:
Press M to turn on the entire map, then press the occupied chunk in the upper left (shortcut key: C) to set the area to be protected.
You can even load chunks by shifting and clicking. You can cancel protection by left-clicking.
ze.tip.friend:
Open your inventory, click the My Team icon in the top left, then create a party and invite friends to join you.
If you are in the same party, quest progress is shared and occupied chunks can also be shared.
ze.tip.galx_comb:
Beacons and radio kits allow you to communicate with the Galactic Federation.
Help them escape the overworld or reach the ultimate skill.
ze.tip.potato_pc:
DH (Distant Horizons: A Level of Detail mod) and shaders (Complementary Shaders - Unbound) require huge specifications.
Removing both will free up a lot of frames. Instead, we have to give up on visuals.
ze.tip.if:
To craft machines in Industrial Foregoing mode, you must use Galactic Federation plastic.
If you're targeting automated facilities, interact with them as much as possible.
ze.tip.explo:
The overworld has many structures worth exploring.
If you want, you can take away not only the contents of the box but also the blocks you need.
ze.tip.season:
Most biomes are affected by the four seasons.
Depending on the season, the duration of day and night changes, allowing certain crops to grow better.
ze.tip.moons:
Various types of moons may appear with a certain probability.
While those moons are in the sky, you may summon many monsters, your crops may be good, or your luck may improve.
ze.tip.ending:
There are two endings to this story.
Escape the overworld or reach the ultimate skill. The choice is yours.
ze.tip.shop:
If you have contact with the Galactic Federation, you can trade with them.
There may be few things to trade at first, but as you help them, you will be able to exchange many good things.
ze.tip.tree:
Most trees fall when cut down.
If you are hit by a falling tree, you will die almost instantly.
